title: తమిళ ‘స్క్రీన్‌ప్లే కింగ్’ కె. భాగ్యరాజ్ కన్నుమూత
description: K bhagyaraj: తమిళ చిత్రపరిశ్రమలో (Kollywood) మరో తీరని విషాదం చోటుచేసుకుంది. సౌత్ సినిమా ‘స్క్రీన్‌ప్లే కింగ్’గా (Screenplay King) పేరొందిన ప్రముఖ సీనియర్ నటుడు, దర్శకుడు,...
content:
K bhagyaraj: తమిళ చిత్రపరిశ్రమలో (Kollywood) మరో తీరని విషాదం చోటుచేసుకుంది. సౌత్ సినిమా ‘స్క్రీన్‌ప్లే కింగ్’గా (Screenplay King) పేరొందిన ప్రముఖ సీనియర్ నటుడు, దర్శకుడు, రచయిత కె. భాగ్యరాజ్ (73) శనివారం (జూన్ 27) కన్నుమూశారు. ఆకస్మిక గుండెపోటు (Cardiac Arrest) రావడంతో ఆయనను చెన్నైలోని అపోలో ఆసుపత్రికి తరలించగా, అక్కడ చికిత్స పొందుతూ ఆయన తుదిశ్వాస విడిచారు. రెండు వారాల క్రితమే (జూన్ 10న) ఆయన గురువు, లెజెండరీ డైరెక్టర్ భరతీరాజా మరణించగా.. ఇప్పుడు ఆయన ప్రియ శిష్యుడు భాగ్యరాజ్ కూడా అనంత లోకాలకు తరలిపోవడంతో కోలీవుడ్‌తో పాటు మొత్తం దక్షిణ భారత సినీ పరిశ్రమ శోకసంద్రంలో మునిగిపోయింది.



Read also:Jananayagan Movie Producer: ‘జననాయగన్’ నిర్మాతకు కీలక పదవి.. సీఎం విజయ్ నిర్ణయంపై విమర్శలు



K bhagyaraj: అసిస్టెంట్ డైరెక్టర్ నుండి ‘స్క్రీన్‌ప్లే కింగ్’ వరకు







1953 జనవరి 7న ఈరోడ్ జిల్లా గోబిచెట్టిపాళయం సమీపంలోని వెల్లాంకోయిల్‌లో జన్మించిన కృష్ణస్వామి భాగ్యరాజ్.. కేవలం సినిమాపై ఉన్న ప్యాషన్‌తో చిత్ర పరిశ్రమలోకి అడుగుపెట్టారు.




గురువు బాటలో: ప్రముఖ దర్శకుడు భరతీరాజా వద్ద ‘16 వయతినిలే’ (తెలుగులో పదహారేళ్ల వయసు) వంటి క్లాసిక్ చిత్రాలకు సహాయ దర్శకుడిగా, కథా రచయితగా సినీ ప్రస్థానాన్ని ప్రారంభించారు.



వన్-మ్యాన్ స్టూడియో: కథ, స్క్రీన్‌ప్లే, డైలాగ్స్, డైరెక్షన్, యాక్టింగ్.. ఇలా అన్ని విభాగాల్లోనూ ఆయన అద్భుత ముద్ర వేశారు. భారీ యాక్షన్ హంగులు లేకుండా, సామాన్య మానవుడి చుట్టూ తిరిగే కథలతో, సునిశిత హాస్యంతో ప్రేక్షకులను కట్టిపడేసే సరికొత్త ట్రెండ్‌కు ఆయన శ్రీకారం చుట్టారు.



సినీ ప్రస్థానం: తన సుదీర్ఘ కెరీర్‌లో మొత్తం 75కి పైగా సినిమాల్లో నటుడిగా మెప్పించిన ఆయన, 25 విజయవంతమైన చిత్రాలకు దర్శకత్వం వహించారు. ఆయన రాసిన స్క్రీన్‌ప్లే స్ట్రక్చర్స్ నేటి తరం యువ దర్శకులకు ఒక పాఠ్యపుస్తకం లాంటివి.

title: Euthanasia: ନେଦରଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ଥର ପାଇଁ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍ ବୟସର ଜଣେ ଶିଶୁଙ୍କୁ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ
description:
ଆମଷ୍ଟରଡାମ: ନେଦରଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ଥର ପାଇଁ, ଜଣେ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍ ବୟସର ଶିଶୁଙ୍କୁ ଆଇନଗତ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ୨୦୨୪ ମସିହାରେ ଆଇନ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ହେବା ପରେ ଏହା ପ୍ରଥମ ମାମଲା। ନୂତନ ନିୟମ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ୧ ରୁ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସର ପିଲାମାନଙ୍କୁ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇପାରିବ ଯଦି ସେମାନେ କୌଣସି ମାରାତ୍ମକ ରୋଗରେ ପୀଡିତ ଥାନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଏହା ଯୋଗୁ ଅସହ୍ୟ ଯନ୍ତ୍ରଣା ଅନୁଭବ କରୁଥାନ୍ତି ତଥା ଆରୋଗ୍ୟ ହେବାର କୌଣସି ଆଶା ନଥିବ। ଡଚ୍ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ସୋଫି ହର୍ମାନ୍ସ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଗତ ବର୍ଷ ଶିଶୁଟି ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ମୃତ୍ୟୁବରଣ କରିଛି। ‌ତେବେ ସେ ଶିଶୁଟିର ବୟସ,ପରିଚୟ କିମ୍ବା ଅସୁସ୍ଥତା ବିଷୟରେ କୌଣସି ସୂଚନା ଦେଇ ନାହାନ୍ତି। ସଂସଦରେ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ବାର୍ଷିକ ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଉପସ୍ଥାପନ କରିବା ସମୟରେ ସେ ଏନେଇ ସୂଚନା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଏହା ମଧ୍ୟ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ କରିଥିବା ଡାକ୍ତର ସମସ୍ତ ଆଇନଗତ ଆବଶ୍ୟକତାକୁ ସଠିକ୍ ଭାବରେ ପାଳନ କରିଛନ୍ତି କି ନାହିଁ ତାହା ଯାଞ୍ଚ୍ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସରକାରୀ ଆଇନଜୀବୀଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରା ମାମଲାର ତଦନ୍ତ କରାଯିବ।
ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟଗତ ଅବସ୍ଥା ପାଇଁ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଅନୁମତିପ୍ରାପ୍ତ
ଡଚ୍ ସରକାର ୨୦୨୪ ମସିହାରେ ଆଇନ ସଂଶୋଧନ କରି ୧ ରୁ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସର ପିଲାମାନଙ୍କୁ କିଛି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପାଇଁ ଅନୁମତି ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ସରକାର ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରିଥିଲେ ଯେ, କେବଳ ଗୁରୁତର ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟଗତ ଅବସ୍ଥା ଥିଲେ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଅନୁମତିପ୍ରାପ୍ତ। ଜୀବନ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ସବୁ ଜାଣି ଗଲିଣି କିମ୍ବା ଜଣେ ଆଉ ବଞ୍ଚିବାକୁ ଚାହୁଁନାହିଁ ବୋଲି ଅନୁଭବ କରୁଥିବା ନେଇ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପାଇଁ ଆବେଦନ କରିବା ଅନୁମତି ପାଇବାର ଆଧାର ନୁହେଁ ବୋଲି ସରକାର କହିଥିଲେ।
ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଦେବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଡାକ୍ତରମାନଙ୍କୁ ଅନେକ ଆଇନଗତ ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ପୂରଣ କରିବାକୁ ପଡିବ। ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରିବାକୁ ପଡିବ ଯେ ରୋଗୀଙ୍କ ଯନ୍ତ୍ରଣା ଅସହ୍ୟ, ଆରୋଗ୍ୟ ହେବାର କୌଣସି ଆଶା ନାହିଁ, ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ତାଙ୍କ ରୋଗ ବିଷୟରେ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଅବଗତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ଏହା ମଧ୍ୟ ନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରିବାକୁ ପଡିବ ଯେ, ରୋଗର ଅନ୍ୟ କୌଣସି ଉପଯୁକ୍ତ ବିକଳ୍ପ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ନାହିଁ। ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ଏକ ସ୍ବତନ୍ତ୍ର ମତାମତ ନେବାକୁ ପଡିବ ଏବଂ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସତର୍କତାର ସହିତ କରାଯିବ। ୧୨ ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍ ବୟସର ରୋଗୀମାନଙ୍କୁ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ପିତାମାତା କିମ୍ବା ଆଇନଗତ ଅଭିଭାବକଙ୍କ ସମ୍ମତି ନେବାକୁ ପଡିବ। ଯେତେବେଳେ ଏହି ଆଇନ ପ୍ରଣୟନ ହୋଇଥିଲା, ସରକାର ଆକଳନ କରିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ପ୍ରତିବର୍ଷ ପ୍ରାୟ ୫ ରୁ ୧୦ ପିଲା ଏହି ନିୟମ ଦ୍ୱାରା ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ହୋଇପାରନ୍ତି।
Earthquake: ପାକିସ୍ତାନରେ ୫.୪ ତୀବ୍ରତାଯୁକ୍ତ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ: ଆତଙ୍କିତ ଲୋକେ ଭୟରେ ଘରୁ ବାହାରକୁ ପଳାଇ ଆସିଲେନେଦରଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡରେ, ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଏକ ବର୍ଷରୁ କମ୍ ବୟସର ଶିଶୁ ଏବଂ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷରୁ ଅଧିକ ବୟସର ବ୍ୟକ୍ତିଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ଅନୁମତି ଦିଆଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏହି ଅଧିକାର ଏକ ରୁ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସର ପିଲାମାନଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଉପଲବ୍ଧ ନଥିଲା। ଏହି ବୟସର ପିଲାମାନଙ୍କୁ କେବଳ ଉପଶମକାରୀ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଦିଆଯାଉଥିଲା। ସେମାନଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପାଇଁ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କରିବାକୁ ପଡୁଥିଲା। ୧୨ ରୁ ୧୫ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସର ପିଲାମାନଙ୍କୁ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ ପାଇଁ ପିତାମାତା କିମ୍ବା ଅଭିଭାବକଙ୍କ ସମ୍ମତି ଆବଶ୍ୟକ। ୧୬ ରୁ ୧୭ ବର୍ଷ ବୟସର କିଶୋରମାନେ ନିଜର ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେଇପାରିବେ, ଯଦିଓ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ପିତାମାତାଙ୍କୁ ଏହି ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟାରେ ସାମିଲ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଯଦି ଜଣେ ଡାକ୍ତର ଆଇନ ଉଲ୍ଲଂଘନ କରନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁ କରାନ୍ତି, ତେବେ ତାଙ୍କୁ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଜେଲ ଦଣ୍ଡ ଏବଂ ଜରିମାନା ହୋଇପାରେ। ୨୦୦୨ ମସିହାରେ ନେଦରଲ୍ୟାଣ୍ଡ ବିଶ୍ୱର ପ୍ରଥମ ଦେଶ ଭାବରେ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁକୁ ଆଇନଗତ କରିଥିଲା। ଏଭଳି ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ମାମଲାକୁ ଏକ ଡାକ୍ତରୀ ଯାଞ୍ଚ୍ କମିଟି ଦ୍ୱାରା ସମୀକ୍ଷା କରାଯାଇଥାଏ। ବେଲଜିୟମ ୨୦୧୪ ମସିହାରେ ସମସ୍ତ ବୟସର ପିଲାମାନଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଇଚ୍ଛାମୃତ୍ୟୁକୁ ଆଇନଗତ କରିଥିଲା।

title: Didn’t report FD interest? Here’s how you may do it
PM Modi emplanes for two-day state visit to Seychelles, to attend National Day Golden Jubilee celebrations
description:
New Delhi , June 27: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Saturday embarked for Victoria, Seychelles, where he will undertake a two-day State Visit to participate in the Golden Jubilee celebrations of the country's National Day as the Guest of Honour.
"Leaving for Seychelles, where I will take part in their National Day celebrations. This year, it is even more special because it is the Golden Jubilee celebrations. Seychelles is a valued maritime neighbour and a key partner in our Vision MAHASAGAR, as well as in advancing the interests of the Global South. I look forward to discussions with my friend, Dr. Patrick Herminie, President of the Republic of Seychelles. I am honoured to be addressing the National Assembly of Seychelles during the visit. I also look forward to meeting the Indian community there," the PM posted on X ahead of his departure.
The Prime Minister's visit from June 27 to June 29 comes at the invitation of Seychelles President Patrick Herminie and is aimed at further strengthening the longstanding partnership between the two countries.
Ahead of his departure, PM Modi said Seychelles remains a valued maritime neighbour and a key partner in India's Vision MAHASAGAR and its shared commitment to the Global South.
He stated that the visit would provide an opportunity for both countries to further deepen their longstanding partnership and work together to advance the progress of their people while promoting security and prosperity in the Indian Ocean region.
"Building on the successful State visit of President Herminie to India in February 2026, I look forward to our discussions aimed at further strengthening our enduring friendship. Together, we will work to advance the progress of our peoples and promote security and prosperity in the Indian Ocean region," the Prime Minister said in his departure statement.
During the visit, PM Modi will hold talks with President Herminie to review the full spectrum of bilateral cooperation and exchange views on regional and international issues of mutual interest.
The Prime Minister will also become the first Indian Prime Minister to address the National Assembly of Seychelles, besides interacting with members of the Indian diaspora in the island nation.
The visit holds special significance as India and Seychelles are marking the 50th anniversary of the establishment of diplomatic relations, which are rooted in mutual trust, shared democratic values, respect for diversity and deep people-to-people ties.
A contingent of the Indian Armed Forces, along with two Indian Navy ships, will also participate in the Golden Jubilee National Day celebrations, highlighting the close defence and maritime cooperation between the two countries.
PM Modi's visit is expected to further deepen bilateral ties, enhance maritime cooperation in the Indian Ocean region and reinforce the shared vision of a secure, peaceful and prosperous region. (ANI)

title: How OTT succeeded where Bollywood failed: Sonali Bendre, Madhuri Dixit, Raveena Tandon, Karisma Kapoor and the reinvention of ’90s leading ladies
description: Once confined to playing glamorous love interests, Sonali Bendre, Madhuri Dixit and Karisma Kapoor are redefining success on OTT. Here's how streaming platforms succeeded where Bollywood failed by creating layered, women-led stories that celebrate experience over stereotypes.
content: There was a time when Hindi cinema's biggest heroines lit up every movie poster, dominated magazine covers and delivered chartbuster songs, yet rarely drove the story. Through much of the 1990s, mainstream Bollywood revolved around the male protagonist. The hero sought revenge, fought villains, chased dreams and transformed lives. The heroine, more often than not, was expected to look beautiful, dance in Switzerland, fall in love, cry at the right moments and disappear into the background whenever the narrative demanded emotional weight. It wasn't because actresses lacked talent. It was because the industry rarely wrote parts that acknowledged it. Three decades later, the same women are finding some of the richest characters of their careers—not on the big screen, but on streaming platforms. From Sonali Bendre and Madhuri Dixit to Karisma Kapoor, the OTT boom has quietly rewritten the rules for actresses once considered "past their prime", proving that age, experience and emotional depth are now creative assets rather than commercial liabilities.             Why did Bollywood's biggest heroines rarely get substantial roles in the 1990s? The 1990s remain one of Bollywood's most commercially successful decades. It gave audiences iconic romances, blockbuster action films and unforgettable music. Yet it also reinforced a formula that often left women with limited agency. In film after film, actresses played the supportive girlfriend, the dutiful wife or the glamorous love interest. Their presence helped sell songs and posters, but rarely altered the course of the story. Even talented performers like Sonali Bendre, Karisma Kapoor, Raveena Tandon, Juhi Chawla and others frequently found themselves confined to conventional parts while male stars enjoyed layered emotional arcs. There were exceptions. Films like Bandit Queen, Mrityudand, Godmother, Damini and Fire challenged the norm, but they remained isolated examples rather than the industry's standard practice. Commercial Bollywood largely believed audiences came for the hero. What has OTT changed? Streaming platforms have dismantled many of those assumptions. Unlike theatrical films that traditionally relied on opening weekend collections and superstar appeal, OTT platforms thrive on storytelling. A compelling script can sustain six or eight episodes, allowing characters to evolve gradually instead of fitting into a three-hour runtime. That shift has transformed the way female characters are written. Women are no longer required to be endlessly virtuous or impossibly glamorous. They can be ambitious, morally conflicted, insecure, ageing, traumatised, flawed and resilient—all within the same story. Perhaps the biggest change is that these women exist independently of a male protagonist. Their lives, careers, friendships and failures are no longer secondary plots.             Sonali Bendre finally gets to play women who feel real Few careers illustrate this transformation better than Sonali Bendre's. For years, she was among Bollywood's most recognisable faces, appearing opposite many of the industry's biggest stars. Yet several of those films offered little room for emotional complexity. On OTT, however, Sonali has embraced entirely different characters. In The Broken News, she plays an accomplished newsroom editor navigating ethical dilemmas, professional rivalry and personal vulnerability. In The Broken News Season 2, those conflicts become even more layered as questions of power, journalism and morality intensify. Her role in Raakh further demonstrated that audiences were ready to watch her portray grief, silence and psychological trauma instead of conventional glamour. Speaking to Eshita Bhargava, Sonali Bendre reflected on how liberating it has been to portray women who are imperfect rather than idealised. She explained that today's stories allow actresses to embrace flawed, authentic characters instead of chasing an unrealistic version of perfection that once dominated mainstream cinema. That creative freedom may be the biggest gift streaming has offered performers of her generation. Madhuri Dixit is no longer expected to be perfect Madhuri Dixit spent the 1990s embodying Bollywood's definition of the perfect heroine. She danced effortlessly, looked immaculate and became one of Indian cinema's biggest stars. Today, her performances carry a different appeal.             Whether it is The Fame Game, Maja Ma or her more recent work, Madhuri appears increasingly interested in exploring women with contradictions rather than preserving an image. During a conversation with Eshita Bhargava around the release of The Fame Game, Madhuri spoke about how the industry's expectations have evolved dramatically. She discussed how actresses of the 1990s constantly faced pressure to fit specific standards of beauty, including expectations around appearance, body type, complexion and overall image. She contrasted that with today's filmmakers, who increasingly encourage authenticity, often preferring minimal make-up and stories written from a distinctly female perspective.             That shift reflects a wider industry change. Female characters are no longer expected to remain glamorous in every frame. Their emotional truth now matters more than visual perfection. Karisma Kapoor's second innings is built on complexity Karisma Kapoor's streaming choices reveal how dramatically storytelling has evolved. Instead of returning through conventional family dramas or nostalgic romances, she has chosen emotionally demanding characters. In Mentalhood, she portrayed the emotional chaos of modern motherhood rather than presenting motherhood as flawless sacrifice. In Murder Mubarak, she balanced glamour with vulnerability, while Brown pushed her even further into emotionally dark territory, playing a damaged detective carrying immense personal grief. These are characters that would have been difficult to imagine for mainstream commercial heroines in the 1990s. Instead of asking audiences to admire her, these stories ask them to understand her. Her recently released series Brown tells the same story.That distinction changes everything.             Has streaming finally stopped defining actresses by age? For decades, Bollywood often struggled to imagine meaningful careers for actresses beyond a certain age. Male stars continued leading romantic blockbusters into their fifties and sixties, while women were frequently expected to disappear, return as mothers to younger heroes or accept significantly reduced roles. Streaming has disrupted that pattern. Today, performers such as Kajol, Sushmita Sen, Raveena Tandon, Manisha Koirala, Juhi Chawla and Shefali Shah are headlining projects because the story demands their presence—not because they fit a conventional definition of a heroine. Age has become part of the character instead of an obstacle to casting. Why business has played an equally important role The transformation isn't purely creative; it is commercial. Streaming platforms compete for subscribers by offering distinctive stories rather than relying solely on theatrical star power. A compelling female-led drama can generate conversations, attract viewers and retain subscriptions just as effectively as an action spectacle. This business model has encouraged writers and producers to take risks that theatrical cinema often avoided. Instead of asking whether an actress can "open" a film, streaming asks whether audiences will stay invested in her story over multiple episodes. That is an entirely different equation. Have audiences changed as well? The success of female-led streaming shows suggests viewers were always willing to embrace nuanced women on screen. What changed was not necessarily the audience, but the opportunities. Modern viewers are spending hours with characters across entire seasons. That extra time allows them to connect with women who are ambitious, vulnerable, selfish, resilient or emotionally complicated. They no longer need to fit neatly into labels such as heroine, mother or wife. They simply need to feel believable.             OTT didn't reinvent these actresses—it finally recognised them The greatest irony of the streaming era is that Sonali Bendre, Madhuri Dixit and Karisma Kapoor did not suddenly become better performers. They always possessed the talent. What changed was the writing. For years, Bollywood asked them to decorate stories built around men. OTT has allowed them to become the story itself. The industry's most celebrated actresses are finally being trusted with characters that acknowledge everything they have gained over the decades—experience, emotional maturity, vulnerability and confidence. Streaming has not merely given the leading ladies of the 1990s a comeback. It has given them something far more valuable: the chance to be seen as complete characters rather than perfect heroines. And in doing so, OTT has succeeded where mainstream Bollywood, for decades, simply failed.

title: Kristen Stewart, Alia Shawkat join hands for ‘The Wrong Girls’
description: Kristen Stewart and Alia Shawkat headline the quirky new comedy series 'The Wrong Girls,' a project co-written by Stewart and helmed by director Dylan Meyer. The narrative revolves around two aimless friends who, after experimenting with a mysterious drug, gain telepathic powers, thrusting them into a chaotic realm of mistaken identities and rivalries. Celebrated as a tribute to spirited women, the series is scheduled for release on August 14, 2026.

title: Alien encouter: visiting the UK's Area 51in a Maserati MCPura
description:
Exploring Britain's own Area 51 in the latest flying object from Modena: Brace for close encounters

Do you believe?
YouGov surveys suggest three-quarters of British people adjudge that alien life exists somewhere in the universe, while a whole third think those extraterrestrials have visited Earth at least once. Seven per cent of our population say they have seen a UFO. But I'd happily wager those figures swell at least a little in this hilly, happy valley in West Yorkshire. The market town of Todmorden is the unofficial UFO capital of the UK - think Area 51 with less Nevada desert and more craft shops.
It's the perfect place to introduce Maserati's latest land-borne craft to British roads. The MCPura represents a nip, tuck and light rebrand for the wondrous MC20 supercar after five years on sale. To the eyes of dedicated car folk, little has changed - reprofiled bumpers and new wheel and paint options summarise its visual makeover - but this car will remain a UFO (unusually fabulous object) to many onlookers. Not least with its dihedral doors and the hugely theatrical folding roof of this Cielo cabrio, it makes even its everyday manoeuvres resemble the extraordinary.

Its dynamic elements are unchanged, a carbon tub at its core and a 621bhp twin-turbocharged 3.0-litre V6 perched beneath its pert, Trident-stamped deck. It drives the rear wheels only through a snappy eight-speed dual-clutch transmission. The MCPura feels distinctly old-school for its lack of hybridisation and there's naturally an awful lot to like about that - particularly on roads as stirring as these.
Todmorden (pronounced Tod-muh-dun) sits at the confluence of three Pennine valleys, and while it doesn't inhabit the more famed driving meccas of the Yorkshire Dales or North York Moors, the Calderdale region it dwells in has a charm all of its own. Hills dominate the horizon in every direction, punching well above their official elevation figures with sweeping consistency and rich textures. Bleating sheep and topsy-turvy dry stone walls etch detail into the picture while wind turbines pepper many of the region's peaks to twist a useful positive from its often inclement weather.

Colin Lyall has owned a second-hand bookshop in Tod, as the locals call it, for 25 years. "Tod is open, welcoming and accepting," he tells me. "It's always been alternative - a nest of counterculture where people come to escape the elements of a more mundane society." Its philosophy clearly embraces a wide spectrum of views about what may occupy the skies above us.
Tod's most famous tale dates back to November 1980 and the apparent abduction of police officer Alan Godfrey as he performed an early morning search for some missing cows. There are copious books and resources that dig gleefully into the finer details (the BBC's Uncanny podcast explores the story with particular eloquence) but Godfrey claims to have seen a large, lit diamond in the sky - 20ft wide and 14ft tall, stationary save for an anticlockwise rotation on its lower section - before losing 25 minutes of his morning and finding himself 100ft farther down the A646, with no recollection of what had occurred in the interim.
Rational explanations abound, but Godfrey has steadfastly stuck to his story for nearly 50 years. And his is far from the only ethereal event on these roads. Reports of silver balls, beams of light and phantom Zeppelins roaming the sky date back to the early 1900s, when the pragmatic suggestion of military aircraft manoeuvres can't quickly shrug off the paranormal twist on events.
"Alan's experience is the big story, the one that centres it," says Colin as he divulges Calderdale's reputation for "high-strangeness events". Ghosts, witches and vampires also star in local legends. It's all up for discussion at his monthly Todmorden UFO Meet, open to all in the Golden Lion pub since 2017. It's well known among the UFO community and attendees have travelled from all over the world to tell their story. So does Colin have an experience of his own? "In Manchester, ironically! I had to go out of town to have mine," he says, laughing. "I saw a silver ball move across the sky very slowly. And I thought: 'Well, what is that?' There was no propulsion system with it. At the altitude that I could see it, it must have been pretty big."
Back in the MCPura, it feels like I'm in danger of triggering my own disturbance, because the car erupts with a histrionic blare each time I push its stark blue starter button. My momentum against the Millstone Grit buildings of Tod town centre feels rather brazen and its open roof alerts me to plenty of "bloomin' hecks" (and other utterances) as I potter around while photographer Sim takes some pictures.
In moments like these, I improbably wish for the hybridisation of its closest supercar rivals - or the fully electric MC20 Folgore, which Maserati promised at launch but cancelled, citing lack of demand. We come in peace, after all, and a mite more subtlety would be welcome. So I'm grateful when the chance arises to whisk Sim back into the Maserati and continue our clockwise loop towards the exact spot where PC Godfrey had his close encounter.

When we reach it there's no plaque, and with the sun shining and turbine blades spinning it's difficult to imagine a domineering craft hovering ahead to halt our progress. So I instead lean into the fast, gentle curves of the A646 to dig deeper into the MCPura's potential. On warm, dry Tarmac, it exhibits little of the savagery I've experienced in wetter conditions in its MC20 forebear. There's grip to spare and I'm quickly notching through the drive modes to sharpen its focus.
The damping is supreme across undulating Tarmac and you can quickly shrug off the more languid vertical movements of GT mode to indulge in the tighter-fisted feel of Sport or Race. This also sharpens the shifts of its already impressive dual-clutch 'box, and with the car's prodigious performance inevitably tricky to wring out on public roads, you instead play tunes on its Nettuno V6 by flick-flacking up and down the gears, feeling the car transform from mild to wild with a couple of choice downchanges.
Consecutive right turns at Cliviger onto The Long Causeway serve up tighter corners and more breathtaking dips and crests for enjoying Maserati's slightly ragged interpretation of the modern supercar experience. The MCPura's best work happens below its limits and there's great satisfaction in achieving a smooth, consistent flow, feeling its mid-engined balance and subtly rearward weight bias inform its cornering attitude rather than govern it. I'd have far busier hands and feet if the sun wasn't so golden, mind. And I don't once gel with its soft, unprogressive brake pedal, which clearly wishes to be stamped hard to the bulkhead on a racetrack rather than carefully modulated on a twisting B-road.

It's not the only imperfection, and while you can sense the influence its engineers took from rival supercars, the MCPura is unashamedly its own, unique thing. As you might well hope at a whisker under £300,000 as tested, with its generously ladled options. Yet it looks twice its asking price with the sun dancing across its multi-layered Fuoriserie paint and the flying buttresses on the Cielo's rear deck more than justifying its sacrifice of a glass cover above the V6.
This is a design more emboldened in drop-top form and I doubt its coupé sibling would have been any more thrilling across the moors. Its handful of niggles are much easier to tolerate with the sun beaming down and the chuffs, whistles and bass of its boosted V6 so easily populating the cabin.
We reach Hebden Bridge - a place brimming with its own UFO sightings - before turning right at Mytholmroyd to tackle Cragg Vale Incline, the longest continuous road ascent in England. Its 968ft rise across 5.5 miles earned it a place in the Grand Départ of the 2014 Tour de France. It's naturally a mite easier with 538lb ft of Italian muscle to call on and the MCPura makes light work of our climb towards Blackstone Edge and the border with Greater Manchester.

Darkness is gradually draping itself across the scenery and an immediate chill prickles our arms as stars begin to pepper the sky and bright lights beam ominously across the valley. "Must be tractors," we both mutter hopefully to one another. Believer or sceptic, it's hard not to glance through the Cielo's targa top with intrigue: the breadth of phenomena across these sprawling moors is enough to carve a glimmer of possibility in even the most closed minds. And should extraterrestrial life not extend a friendly hand to shake, we have the ideal getaway car.
Drive it yourself

Our 'Tod Triangle' takes in 32 miles and 1hr 10min of glorious Pennines scenery, delays caused by unplanned abductions or time slips notwithstanding. Tally your visit with the third Tuesday of the month to attend the Todmorden UFO Meet at the Golden Lion — friendly sceptics very much welcome.
Plentiful pubs or cafes can be tapped in as waypoints, but the towns of Todmorden, Mereclough, Hebden Bridge and Littleborough are your key anchors to replicate our route. Bridestones Moor and Stoodley Pike allow you to park up for a dramatic hike among the scenery (and a closer peek to the skies) safe in the knowledge that you can soothe any aches and pains afterwards with the hot and cold contrast sauna at New Delight Inn (iglusauna.co.uk).
Short, worthwhile detours include Mankinholes, a ruggedly rural spot with numerous otherworldly occurrences to its name (though narrow lanes to negotiate), the towering structure of Baitings Reservoir dam and the unlikely inland beach of Hollingworth Lake, complete with fish 'n' chip shops, an ice cream parlour and an amusement arcade.


Maserati MCPura Cielo


Price
£227,070


Engine
V6, 2992cc, twin-turbo, petrol


Power
621bhp at 7500rpm


Torque
538lb ft at 3000rpm


Gearbox

Kerb weight
1560kg


0-62mph
2.9sec

title: ‘Violence will be met with violence’: US-Iran trade strikes again? Why Middle East ceasefire is under new strain
description: US-Iran trade strikes: US Central Command said aircraft struck missile and drone storage locations and coastal radar sites, and a US official reported the operation had concluded. Iran said a projectile struck the area around a pier in Sirik in southern Iran, and that Iranian naval forces responded by striking US military targets in the region.
content: US-Iran trade strikes: US Vice President JD Vance has defended American strikes against Iran, saying that “violence will be met with violence”. On Friday, the US carried out retaliatory strikes against Tehran after Iranian forces hit a cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz a day earlier. Now, each country is accusing the other of violating terms of a ceasefire agreed on last week.US strikes Iranian sitesUS Central Command said aircraft struck missile and drone storage locations and coastal radar sites, and a US official reported the operation had concluded. Iran said a projectile struck the area around a pier in Sirik in southern Iran, and that Iranian naval forces responded by striking US military targets in the region, Reuters reported.Elsewhere there were signs of progress, however, as Israel and Lebanon signed an agreement to end the fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah. Both sides framed the deal as an initial step that calls for Hezbollah to disarm and Israel to withdraw troops from Lebanon, but it was not clear how it would be enforced. Hezbollah said it would not cooperate.What Iran said?Tehran has said it would control ⁠the Strait of Hormuz and warned Gulf states not to side with Washington after Thursday's attack on a cargo ship traveling near Oman's coast. US President Donald Trump blamed the attack on Iran and said it violated last week's agreement."The unwarranted aggression against commercial shipping by Iranian forces clearly violated the ceasefire," US Central Command said in its statement announcing strikes, which it called "a powerful response to yesterday’s attack on a commercial ship that was transiting the Strait of Hormuz."The US military said it would continue to provide "safe passage coordination and support" to commercial vessels transiting the strait.‘Violence will be met with violence’Vance, once seen as a skeptic on US intervention in Iran but now a Trump administration point person on the conflict, said the Americans have honored the ceasefire deal, also known as a memorandum of understanding."Iran signed a ceasefire agreement. We have honored it. If they have disagreements about how the MOU is being applied, they can pick up the phone. But violence will be met with violence," Vance said on X.Iranian state media, citing an unnamed military source, reported the strike at the port of Sirik after an explosion was heard there. The source said several warning shots had been fired from Sirik toward vessels that violated Strait of Hormuz regulations about five ‌hours earlier, adding ⁠two warning missiles had also been launched from the nearby Karpan area toward the strategic waterway.The Revolutionary Guards said that in response its navy "struck the locations where the terrorist U.S. military is stationed in the region" and warned that any further US attacks would be met with a broader response, according to the statement carried on state media.The ceasefire agreement gives Iran control over ship traffic in the strait, the Guards said."However, the United States, by provoking various fronts, sought to violate this commitment, and the necessary response was given and will continue to be given. If the aggression is repeated, our response will be broader than this," the Revolutionary Guards said.'Foolish violation'Trump on Friday slammed Iran, blaming the Islamic nation for carrying out a drone strike on multiple vessels in the Strait of Hormuz and calling it a "foolish" violation of the recently-brokered ceasefire between the two countries.In a post on Truth Social, Trump said Iran had shot at least four one-way drones on ships in the strait."The Islamic Republic of Iran shot at least four One Way Attack Drones at Ships transversing the Strait of Hormuz. One of the Drones solidly hit the upper deck of a large and very expensive Cargo Carrying Ship," the US president wrote.(With inputs from Reuters)

title: Earthquake: ପାକିସ୍ତାନରେ ୫.୪ ତୀବ୍ରତାଯୁକ୍ତ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ: ଆତଙ୍କିତ ଲୋକେ ଭୟରେ ଘରୁ ବାହାରକୁ ପଳାଇ ଆସିଲେ
description:
ଇସଲାମାବାଦ:ବିଶ୍ୱରେ କିଛି ଦିନ ଧରି ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟୟ ଜାରି ରହିଛି। ଶନିବାର ସକାଳେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନରେ ଏକ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଅନୁଭୂତ ହୋଇଛି। ଏହା ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ବାସିନ୍ଦାଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଆତଙ୍କ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି। ଆତଙ୍କିତ ଲୋକେ ଭୟରେ ଘରୁ ବାହାରକୁ ପଳାଇ ଆସିଥିବାର ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି।
ସକାଳ ୮ଟା ୫୩ ମିନିଟରେ ଏହି ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଅନୁଭୂତ ହୋଇଥିଲା
ରିକ୍ଟର ସ୍କେଲରେ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପର ତୀବ୍ରତା ୫.୪ ଥିବା ଭୂକମ୍ପ ଗବେଷଣା କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ପକ୍ଷରୁ ସୂଚନା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ୟୁରୋପୀୟ ଭୂମଧ୍ୟସାଗରୀୟ ଭୂକମ୍ପ ବିଜ୍ଞାନ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଭୂପୃଷ୍ଠର ପ୍ରାୟ ୩୫ କିଲୋମିଟର ଗଭୀରତାରେ ଚ ହୋଇଥିବା ଅନୁମାନ କରାଯାଉଛି।ରିପୋର୍ଟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଶନିବାର ସକାଳ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ସମୟ ସକାଳ ୮ଟା ୫୩ ମିନିଟରେ ଏହି ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଅନୁଭୂତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ନ୍ୟାସନାଲ ସେଣ୍ଟର ଫର୍ ସିସମୋଲୋଜିରୁ ମିଳିଥିବା ତଥ୍ୟ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଭୂମିକମ୍ପର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରସ୍ଥଳ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ପୃଷ୍ଠରୁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୪୦ ରୁ ୭୫ କିଲୋମିଟର ତଳେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲା। ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଯୋଗୁ କୌଣସି କ୍ଷୟକ୍ଷତି ହୋଇଥିବାର ରିପୋର୍ଟ ମିଳିନାହିଁ।
Trump: ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦରେ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ରାସ୍ତା, ଭାରତକୁ ଧନ୍ୟବାଦ ଜଣାଇଲେ

title: Simbu wraps major 'Arasan' shoot after night schedule
description: Actor Silambarasan, also known as Simbu, has wrapped up a major shooting schedule for his upcoming film 'Arasan'. The actor shared a video of himself with director Vetri Maaran, marking the end of over two months of continuous filming, much of which took place at night. The film boasts a star-studded cast including Vijay Sethupathi and Andrea Jeremiah, with music by Anirudh.

title: ଅଲୋଡା ହେଲା ନବଜାତ ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ର: ବୁଦା ମୂଳରୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର
description:
ପାଟଣା,୨୭।୬(ବୀର କିଶୋର ଦାଶ): ଏକ ବୁଦା ମୂଳରୁ ଶନିବାର ସକାଳୁ ଏକ ନବଜାତ ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ର ଉଦ୍ଧାର ହୋଇଛି। କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଜିଲା ସାହାରପଡା ବ୍ଲକ ଖଜିରାପାଟ ପଞ୍ଚାୟତ ରଘୁନାଥ ପୁର ଗାଁ ର ଏକ ବୁଦା ମୁଳରୁ ଲୋକେ ଛୁଆର କାନ୍ଦ ଶୁଣି ପୋଲିସ ଓ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଆଶାକର୍ମୀଙ୍କୁ ଖବର ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଙ୍ଗନୱାଡ଼ି କର୍ମୀ ଓ ଆଶାକର୍ମୀ ଶିଶୁ ପୁତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରିବା ପରେ୧୦୮ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ ସହାୟତାରେ ଉଦୟ ପୁର ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତୀ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ନବ […]
The post ଅଲୋଡା ହେଲା ନବଜାତ ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ର: ବୁଦା ମୂଳରୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ପାଟଣା,୨୭।୬(ବୀର କିଶୋର ଦାଶ): ଏକ ବୁଦା ମୂଳରୁ ଶନିବାର ସକାଳୁ ଏକ ନବଜାତ ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ର ଉଦ୍ଧାର ହୋଇଛି। କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଜିଲା ସାହାରପଡା ବ୍ଲକ ଖଜିରାପାଟ ପଞ୍ଚାୟତ ରଘୁନାଥ ପୁର ଗାଁ ର ଏକ ବୁଦା ମୁଳରୁ ଲୋକେ ଛୁଆର କାନ୍ଦ ଶୁଣି ପୋଲିସ ଓ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଆଶାକର୍ମୀଙ୍କୁ ଖବର ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଙ୍ଗନୱାଡ଼ି କର୍ମୀ ଓ ଆଶାକର୍ମୀ ଶିଶୁ ପୁତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରିବା ପରେ୧୦୮ଆମ୍ବୁଲାନ୍ସ ସହାୟତାରେ ଉଦୟ ପୁର ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତୀ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ନବ ଜାତକ ଶିଶୁ ପୁତ୍ରକୁ କିଏ କାହିଁକି ଏଭଳି ଛାଡ଼ି ଦେଇ ଚାଲି ଯାଇଛି ତାହା ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇନାହିଁ। ଅବୈଧପ୍ରଣୟରୁ ଶିଶୁ ପୂତ୍ର ଜନ୍ମ ହୋଇଛି କି କୁମାରୀ ମାତୃତ୍ୱରୁ ଏଭଳି ଘଟିଛି ତାହା ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇ ନାହିଁ ଶିଶୁ ପୁତ୍ରର ଶରୀର ରେ ପିମ୍ପୁଡ଼ି କାମୁଡି ଦେଇଥିବା ସହ ଅନେକ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଘା ହୋଇଥିବାରୁ ତାଙ୍କୁ କେନ୍ଦୁଝର ଜିଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତର କରାଯିବ ବୋଲି ଗୋଷ୍ଠି ସାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ଅଧିକାରି ଡ଼ାକ୍ତର ମନୋରଞ୍ଜନ ଜେନା କହିଛନ୍ତି।

title: The power and peril of religious mass politics
description: The Khilafat movement of 1919 offers a century-old lesson in how religious symbols can mobilise democratic mass politics, provided they serve an inclusive political project rather than become ends in themselves.

title: Veteran filmmaker K. Bhagyaraj passes away at 73 due to cardiac arrest
description: Veteran filmmaker K. Bhagyaraj, celebrated as the "Screenplay King" of Tamil cinema, has passed away at 73 following a cardiac arrest. Known for his relatable characters and sharp humor, Bhagyaraj began his career assisting Bharathiraja before carving his own niche. His innovative storytelling, focusing on common people and intricate plots, revolutionized Tamil screenwriting. His sudden demise has sent shockwaves through the industry, with tributes pouring in for the irreplaceable talent.

title: Owner of car searched by police after Beijing tower plane crash identified
description: Vehicle was at airfield from where aircraft that hit Citic Tower took off

title: Angelina Jolie prepares for trial after setback in Brad Pitt winery case
description: The legal showdown between Angelina Jolie and Brad Pitt over Château Miraval escalates as a judge permits Pitt to question executives from the purchasing company. Pitt claims the buyer is tied to a 'Russia-affiliated spirits conglomerate,' which could jeopardize his reputation. In contrast, Jolie's legal team argues the sale was purely business-oriented and eagerly anticipates the trial, downplaying the court's recent decisions.

title: Meg Cabot says she’s seen the latest ‘Princess Diaries 3’ script
description: Great news for 'Princess Diaries' enthusiasts! The eagerly awaited screenplay for the third installment is finished and has received enthusiastic acclaim from the original author, Meg Cabot. Despite earlier hiccups in development, the project is back on track, with Anne Hathaway ready to don her tiara as Princess Mia once more. Fans can look forward to a sequel that promises to satisfy.

title: ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ର ଉଦ୍ଧାର ଘଟଣା , ପୋଷ୍ୟ ସଂସ୍ଥାକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କଲା ପୋଲିସ
description:
ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି,୨୭।୬(ଅଶେଷ ନାଥ ମିଶ୍ର): ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଲକ ଜକର ଗ୍ରାମ ନିକଟରେ ଥିବା ମା’ ରତ୍ନେଶ୍ୱରୀ ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିସର ପରିତ୍ୟକ୍ତ ଜମିରୁ, ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ସାରେ ପୋଲିସ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ବିଳମ୍ବିତ ରାତିରେ ବ୍ରହ୍ମପୁର ଗୋସାଇଁ ନୂଆଗାଁ ସ୍ଥିତ ଉତ୍କଳ ବାଳାଶ୍ରମ ପୋଷ୍ୟ ସଂସ୍ଥାକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଜଣାପଡିଛି । କେ.ନୂଆଗାଁ ଥାନା ଏଏସଆଇ ସୁବାସ ବାୟକ, ଜିଲା ମହିଳା ଓ ଶିଶୁ ପ୍ରକଳ୍ପ ଅଧିକାରୀ ରାଜଶ୍ରୀ ଦାସ, ଚିକିଟିର ଅଙ୍ଗନୱାଡ଼ି କର୍ମୀ ବୃନ୍ଦଙ୍କ […]
The post ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ର ଉଦ୍ଧାର ଘଟଣା , ପୋଷ୍ୟ ସଂସ୍ଥାକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କଲା ପୋଲିସ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି,୨୭।୬(ଅଶେଷ ନାଥ ମିଶ୍ର): ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଲକ ଜକର ଗ୍ରାମ ନିକଟରେ ଥିବା ମା’ ରତ୍ନେଶ୍ୱରୀ ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିସର ପରିତ୍ୟକ୍ତ ଜମିରୁ, ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ସାରେ ପୋଲିସ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ବିଳମ୍ବିତ ରାତିରେ ବ୍ରହ୍ମପୁର ଗୋସାଇଁ ନୂଆଗାଁ ସ୍ଥିତ ଉତ୍କଳ ବାଳାଶ୍ରମ ପୋଷ୍ୟ ସଂସ୍ଥାକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଥିବା ଜଣାପଡିଛି । କେ.ନୂଆଗାଁ ଥାନା ଏଏସଆଇ ସୁବାସ ବାୟକ, ଜିଲା ମହିଳା ଓ ଶିଶୁ ପ୍ରକଳ୍ପ ଅଧିକାରୀ ରାଜଶ୍ରୀ ଦାସ, ଚିକିଟିର ଅଙ୍ଗନୱାଡ଼ି କର୍ମୀ ବୃନ୍ଦଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ପୋଷ୍ୟ ସଂସ୍ଥାର ସାମାଜିକ କର୍ମୀ ଅରୁନ୍ଧତୀ ପଣ୍ଡାଙ୍କୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଛି। ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟାରେ କେହି ଜଣେ ଅଜ୍ଞାତ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି କ୍ଷୀର ବୋତଲ ସହ କପଡ଼ାରେ ଗୁଡ଼ାଇ ଶିଶୁଟିକୁ ମନ୍ଦିର ନିକଟ ପରିତ୍ୟକ୍ତ ଜମିରେ ଛାଡ଼ି ଚାଲିଯାଇଥିଲେ। ଶିଶୁଟିର କାନ୍ଦ ଶୁଣି କେତେକ ବ୍ୟକ୍ତି ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ଶିଶୁକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରିବା ସହ ଜକର ପଞ୍ଚାୟତ
ସରପଞ୍ଚ ରଶ୍ମିତା କୁମାରୀ ପ୍ରଧାନ ଏବଂ ସରପଞ୍ଚ ପ୍ରତିନିଧି ପ୍ରଶାନ୍ତ ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କୁ ଫୋନ ଯୋଗେ ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ। ସରପଞ୍ଚଙ୍କ ପରାମର୍ଶ କ୍ରମେ ସାମାଜିକ କର୍ମୀ ମନୋଜ କୁମାର ପ୍ରଧାନ ତୁରନ୍ତ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିକେ. ନୂଆଗାଁ ଥାନା ଆଇଆଇସି ବିଶ୍ୱଜିତ ନାୟକଙ୍କୁ ସମୁଦାୟ ଘଟଣା ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ। ପୋଲିସ ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ ପହଞ୍ଚି ଶିଶୁଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରି ତୁରନ୍ତ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ନିମନ୍ତେ ଚିକିଟି ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ଭର୍ତ୍ତି କରିଥିଲେ। ଶିଶୁଟିର ବୟସ ପ୍ରାୟ ୩ ମାସ ହେବ ବୋଲି ଡାକ୍ତର କହିଥିଲେ। ପ୍ରାଥମିକ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପରେ ଶିଶୁଟି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସୁସ୍ଥ ଥିବାରୁ ଆଇଆଇସି ଙ୍କ ପରାମର୍ଶ କ୍ରମେ ଶିଶୁଟିକୁ ପୋଷ୍ୟ ସଂସ୍ଥାକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ସଂସ୍ଥାର ସଦସ୍ୟା ସାମାଜିକ କର୍ମୀ ଶିଶୁକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଥିବା ନେଇ ଆଇଆଇସିଙ୍କୁ ଲିଖିତ ପତ୍ର ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଶିଶୁଙ୍କ ଜନ୍ମିତ ମାତା ପିତା କିଏ ଏବଂ କେଉଁ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ପଡି ଶିଶୁ ପୁତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ସେଠାରେ ଛାଡି ଦେଇଥିଲେ ସେ ନେଇ ତଦନ୍ତ ଚାଲିଥିବା ଆଇଆଇସି କହିଛନ୍ତି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1, Most Trusted Odia Daily

The post ଶିଶୁପୁତ୍ର ଉଦ୍ଧାର ଘଟଣା , ପୋଷ୍ୟ ସଂସ୍ଥାକୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କଲା ପୋଲିସ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: TN govt appoints film producer as spl representative in Delhi, draws oppn ire
description: The government has issued an order for the appointment to the temporary post which is equivalent in status to that of a minister, dated June 23 for a period of one year

title: Salman Khan's next with Vamsi to wrap by October
description: Salman Khan's latest action-packed saga, currently known as 'SVC63', is on the verge of wrapping up under the expert direction of Vamsi Paidipally and the production prowess of Dil Raju. With completion expected by October, there's immense anticipation for a possible Eid 2027 release. Dil Raju's confidence shines through as he hints at a possible title change to 'The Messengers' and praises the film's engaging music and Salman's charisma.

title: Evidence leaves little room for doubt; Palestinian children were deliberately targeted: Justice S. Muralidhar
description: The Chair of the UN Independent International Commission of Inquiry on the Occupied Palestinian Territory on the commission’s latest report, and more.

title: Accident: ପାରାଦୀପ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ସିରିଜ୍ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା: ତିନି କାରକୁ ଧକା ଦେଲା ଯାତ୍ରୀବାହୀ ବସ୍
description:
ଜଗତସିଂହପୁର: କଟକ-ପାରାଦୀପ ରାସ୍ତା ଦିନକୁ ଦିନ ବିପଜ୍ଜନକ ହେଉଛି। ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ସିରିଜ୍ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଥିଲା। ତିନୋଟି କାରକୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇଥିଲା ବସ୍। ପାରାଦୀପରୁ କଟକ ଅଭିମୁଖେ ଯାଉଥିବା ତ୍ରିଦେବୀ ଯାତ୍ରୀବାହୀ ବସ୍ ନୂଆଗଡ଼ ନିକଟରେ ଦ୍ରୁତଗତିରେ ଆସୁଥିବା ବେଳେ ହଠାତ୍ ଭାରସାମ୍ୟ ହରାଇ ତିନୋଟି କାରକୁ ପଛପଟୁ ଧକ୍କା ଦେଇଥିଲା।
ଯାତ୍ରୀମାନେ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ
ଧକ୍କାରେ ତିନୋଟି କାର କ୍ଷତିଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ବସ୍‌ର ସାମ୍ନା କାଚ ମଧ୍ୟ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାଙ୍ଗିଯାଇଥିଲା। ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ପରେ କିଛି ସମୟ ପାଇଁ ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଯାତାୟତ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ବସ୍ ଓ କାର ଯାତ୍ରୀମାନେ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ଘଟଣା ସ୍ଥଳରେ ଲକ୍ ପୁଲିସ ପହଞ୍ଚି ତଦନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛି।
Murder: ବନ୍ଦ ଘରୁ ମିଳିଲା ଯୁବକଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହ: ହତ୍ୟା ସନ୍ଦେହ

title: Trump: ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦରେ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ରାସ୍ତା, ଭାରତକୁ ଧନ୍ୟବାଦ ଜଣାଇଲେ
description:
ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦ/ୱାସିଂଟନ: ଆମେରିକାର ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ଡୋନାଲ୍ଡ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦର ଏକ ରାସ୍ତାକୁ ତାଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ନାମିତ କରାଯାଇଥିବାରୁ ଭାରତକୁ ଧନ୍ୟବାଦ ଜଣାଇଛନ୍ତି। ତାଙ୍କ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ, ଟ୍ରୁଥ୍ ସୋସିଆଲରେ, ଡୋନାଲ୍ଡ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ ଏହାକୁ ଏକ ଅଭୂତପୂର୍ବ ସମ୍ମାନ ବୋଲି ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ ଉଦ୍‌ଘାଟନ ଉତ୍ସବର ଏକ ଫଟୋ ମଧ୍ୟ ସେୟାର କରିଛନ୍ତି। ବୁଧବାର, ଜୁନ୍ ୨୪ ତାରିଖରେ, ତେଲେଙ୍ଗାନାର ରେଭନ୍ଥ ରେଡ୍ଡୀ ସରକାର ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦରେ ଆମେରିକାର ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତିଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ନାମିତ ଏକ ରାସ୍ତାକୁ ଆନୁଷ୍ଠାନିକ ଭାବରେ ଉଦ୍‌ଘାଟନ କରିଥିଲେ। ଆମେରିକୀୟ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଦୂତ ସେର୍ଗିଓ ଗୋର୍ ଏହି ଉତ୍ସବରେ ଅଂଶଗ୍ରହଣ କରି କହିଥିଲେ, ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦ ଭାରତ ଏବଂ ଆମେରିକା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସୁଦୃଢ଼ ​​ସହଭାଗୀତାର ଏକ ଉଦାହରଣ, ଦ୍ୱିପାକ୍ଷିକ ସମ୍ପର୍କକୁ ଆଗକୁ ବଢାଇବାରେ ସହରର ବର୍ଦ୍ଧିତ ଭୂମିକା ଉପରେ ସେ ଗୁରୁତ୍ବାରୋପ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏହା ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦର ନାନକରାମଗୁଡ଼ାରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ।
ଆମେରିକା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସମ୍ପର୍କର ପ୍ରତୀକାତ୍ମକ ସ୍ୱୀକୃତି ଭାବରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରିଛନ୍ତି
 ଏହି ରାସ୍ତା ଆମେରିକୀୟ କନସୁଲେଟ୍ ସହିତ ସଂଲଗ୍ନ। ଏହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ମାଇକ୍ରୋସଫ୍ଟ, ଗୁଗୁଲ୍ ଏବଂ ଆମାଜନ ଭଳି ବଡ଼ ନାମ ସମେତ ଅନେକ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ପ୍ରଯୁକ୍ତିବିଦ୍ୟା କମ୍ପାନିର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟ ମଧ୍ୟ ରହିଛି। ଅଧିକାରୀମାନେ ଏହି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମକୁ ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦ ଏବଂ ଆମେରିକା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସମ୍ପର୍କର ପ୍ରତୀକାତ୍ମକ ସ୍ୱୀକୃତି ଭାବରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରିଛନ୍ତି।ତେଲେଙ୍ଗାନାର ଉପମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମଲ୍ଲୁ ଭାଟି ବିକ୍ରମାର୍କ ଏବଂ ସର୍ଗିଓ ଗୋର୍ ଆନୁଷ୍ଠାନିକ ଭାବରେ ରାସ୍ତାର ଉଦ୍‌ଘାଟନ କରି ଏହାକୁ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ନାମିତ କରିଥିଲେ। ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ ଉଦ୍‌ଘାଟନ ସମୟରେ ନିଜର ଖୁସି ପ୍ରକାଶ କରି କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ପୂର୍ବରୁ କୌଣସି ଆମେରିକୀୟ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତିଙ୍କୁ ଏପରି ଭାବରେ ସମ୍ମାନିତ କରାଯାଇ ନଥିଲା। ଏଭଳି ସମ୍ମାନରେ ସମ୍ମାନିତ ହୋଇଥିବା ମୁଁ ପ୍ରଥମ ଆମେରିକୀୟ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ।
ତେଲେଙ୍ଗାନା ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ରେଭନ୍ତ ରେଡ୍ଡୀ ଡିସେମ୍ବର ୨୦୨୫ରେ ଏହି ରାସ୍ତାକୁ ଆମେରିକା ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତିଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ନାମିତ କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ଆମେରିକୀୟ କନସୁଲେଟ୍ ସଂଲଗ୍ନ ଏହି ରାସ୍ତା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଆମେରିକୀୟ କନସୁଲେଟ୍ ରୋଡ୍ ଭାବରେ ଜଣାଶୁଣା ଥିଲା। ହାଇଦ୍ରାବାଦର ବର୍ଦ୍ଧିତ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ମାନ୍ୟତା ଏବଂ ଭାରତ-ଆମେରିକୀୟ ସମ୍ପର୍କକୁ ସୁଦୃଢ଼ ​​କରିବାରେ ସହରର ଭୂମିକାକୁ ନେଇ ଏହି ନାମକରଣ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା।
Earthquake: ବୋଝ ଉପରେ ନଳିତା ବିଡ଼ା: ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାରେ ପୁଣି ୪.୯ ତୀବ୍ରତା ଯୁକ୍ତ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ

title: ବାଲେଶ୍ୱରରେ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସଂଘର୍ଷ: ଶୋଭାଯାତ୍ରାବେଳେ ଟେକାପଥର ମାଡ଼

title: ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ-ଲେବାନନ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତି ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷରିତ, ହେଜବୋଲାକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବାକୁ ପଡିବ ଏସବୁ ସର୍ତ୍ତ
description:
ଜେରୁଜେଲମ,୨୭।୬: ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରାଚ୍ୟରୁ ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ, ଐତିହାସିକ ଖବର ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସୁଛି। ଯୁଦ୍ଧର ନିଆଁରେ ଜଳୁଥିବା ଦେଶଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଏବଂ ଲେବାନନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଶେଷରେ ଶାନ୍ତିର ପ୍ରଥମ ଝଲକ ଦେଖାଦେଇଛି। ଆମେରିକାର ମଧ୍ୟସ୍ଥତା ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଦୁଇ ଦେଶ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଏକ ଐତିହାସିକ ଢାଞ୍ଚା ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ହୋଇଛି। ୱାଶିଂଟନରେ ଏହି ତ୍ରିପାକ୍ଷିକ ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଘୋଷଣା କରି, ଆମେରିକାର ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମାର୍କୋ ରୁବିଓ ଏହାକୁ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ଶାନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା ଦିଗରେ ଏକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଭାବରେ […]
The post ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ-ଲେବାନନ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତି ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷରିତ, ହେଜବୋଲାକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବାକୁ ପଡିବ ଏସବୁ ସର୍ତ୍ତ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଜେରୁଜେଲମ,୨୭।୬: ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରାଚ୍ୟରୁ ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ, ଐତିହାସିକ ଖବର ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସୁଛି। ଯୁଦ୍ଧର ନିଆଁରେ ଜଳୁଥିବା ଦେଶଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଏବଂ ଲେବାନନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଶେଷରେ ଶାନ୍ତିର ପ୍ରଥମ ଝଲକ ଦେଖାଦେଇଛି। ଆମେରିକାର ମଧ୍ୟସ୍ଥତା ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଦୁଇ ଦେଶ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଏକ ଐତିହାସିକ ଢାଞ୍ଚା ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ହୋଇଛି। ୱାଶିଂଟନରେ ଏହି ତ୍ରିପାକ୍ଷିକ ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଘୋଷଣା କରି, ଆମେରିକାର ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମାର୍କୋ ରୁବିଓ ଏହାକୁ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ଶାନ୍ତି ଏବଂ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା ଦିଗରେ ଏକ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଭାବରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଦୁଇ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଦଶନ୍ଧି ଧରି ଚାଲିଥିବା ଉତ୍ତେଜନାକୁ ଦୂର କରିବା ଏବଂ ସୀମାରେ ଶାନ୍ତି ଫେରାଇ ଆଣିବା ପାଇଁ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ରଖିଛି। ୱାଶିଂଟନରେ ଚାରି ଦିନର ଜଟିଳ ଏବଂ ଦୀର୍ଘ ବୈଠକ ପରେ ଉଭୟ ଦେଶର ପ୍ରତିନିଧିମାନେ ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷର କରିବାକୁ ରାଜି ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି।
ଆମେରିକାର ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମାର୍କୋ ରୁବିଓ ସୋସିଆଲ ମିଡିଆ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ X ରେ ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାର ବିବରଣୀ ଶେୟାର କରିଛନ୍ତି। ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଲେବାନନର ସାର୍ବଭୌମ ସରକାର ଏବଂ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ସରକାରକୁ ସାମିଲ କରି ଆମେରିକାର ସମର୍ଥନ ଦ୍ୱାରା ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ସମ୍ଭବ ହୋଇପାରିଛି। ରୁବିଓ ସ୍ବୀକାର କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଆଗକୁ ରାସ୍ତା କଷ୍ଟକର ଏବଂ ଭୂମିରେ ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାକୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାବରେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରୀ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ବହୁତ ସମୟ ଏବଂ କଠିନ ପରିଶ୍ରମ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ହେବ।
ଫକ୍ସ ନ୍ୟୁଜ ସହିତ କଥାବାର୍ତ୍ତା କରି, ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମନ୍ତବ୍ୟ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଏହି ଯାତ୍ରାର ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ପ୍ରାୟତଃ ସବୁଠାରୁ କଷ୍ଟକର ଆଜି ନିଆଯାଇଛି। ଇସ୍ରାଏଲୀ ନାଗରିକଙ୍କ ଦୁଃଖଦତା ଉପରେ ଆଲୋକପାତ କରି, ବିଶେଷକରି ଉତ୍ତର ଗାଲିଲିର ଯେଉଁମାନେ ଦୀର୍ଘ ସମୟ ଧରି ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ସହି ଆସିଛନ୍ତି, ସେ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଯେତେବେଳେ ସାଇରନ ବାଜିବ, ପିଲାମାନେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ପାଠପଢ଼ା ଛାଡିବାକୁ ପଡ଼ିଥାଏ ଏବଂ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ବଙ୍କରକୁ ପଳାଇବାକୁ ବାଧ୍ୟ କରାଯାଏ। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ, ଏହି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଏକ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଛି।
ଏହି ଐତିହାସିକ ଅବସରରେ, ଆମେରିକାରେ ଲେବାନନର ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଦୂତ ନାଦା ହମାଦେହ ଆଲୋଚନା ଆୟୋଜନ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଆମେରିକାର ନେତୃତ୍ୱକୁ ଧନ୍ୟବାଦ ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ। ସେ ବୈଠକଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଦୀର୍ଘ ଏବଂ ଚ୍ୟାଲେଞ୍ଜିଂ ଭାବରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରିଥିଲେ କିନ୍ତୁ ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଏହି ମାଇଲଖୁଣ୍ଟ ହାସଲ କରିବା ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀଙ୍କ ନେତୃତ୍ୱ ଏବଂ ଲେବାନନ ସଶସ୍ତ୍ର ବାହିନୀର ଦେଶପ୍ରେମ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସମ୍ଭବ ହୋଇପାରିଛି।
ଏହି ସମୟରେ, ଆମେରିକାରେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲର ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଦୂତ ୟେହିଲ ଲିଟର ଏହି ବିକାଶକୁ ଏକ ଐତିହାସିକ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ବୋଲି ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରିଥିଲେ। ସେ ଆମେରିକାର ବୈଦେଶିକ ସଚିବ ମାର୍କୋ ରୁବିଓ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ସମଗ୍ର ଦଳକୁ ପ୍ରଶଂସା କରି କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଏହି ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ଡୋନାଲ୍ଡ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପଙ୍କ ‘ଶକ୍ତି ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଶାନ୍ତ’ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିକୋଣକୁ ଆଗକୁ ବଢ଼ାଏ। ଲାଇଟର ଉଲ୍ଲେଖ କରିଥିଲେ ଯେ ମାତ୍ର ଚାରି ଦିନ ପୂର୍ବରୁ, ଏହା ଦେଖାଯାଉଥିଲା ଯେ ଆଲୋଚନା ପଥଭ୍ରଷ୍ଟ ହେବ ଏବଂ ଇରାନ ଏବଂ ଏହାର ସହଯୋଗୀମାନେ ଏହି ପ୍ରୟାସକୁ ବିଫଳ କରିବେ; ତଥାପି, କଠିନ ପରିଶ୍ରମ ଦ୍ୱାରା, ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ପୁନର୍ବାର ଟ୍ରାକରେ ଆସିଛି।
ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାର ଏକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ସର୍ତ୍ତ ହେଉଛି ଯେ ହେଜବୋଲା ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଲେବାନନରେ ସମସ୍ତ ସାମରିକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକଳାପ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାବରେ ବନ୍ଦ କରିବ। ହେଜବୋଲାକୁ ଏହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳରୁ ତାର ଲଢୁଆ ଏବଂ ଅସ୍ତ୍ରଶସ୍ତ୍ରକୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାହାର କରିବାକୁ ପଡିବ। ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଲେବାନନ ସେନା ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବ, ଯେତେବେଳେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ପ୍ରତିରକ୍ଷା ବାହିନୀ (IDF) ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ ଲେବାନନ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରୁ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାହାର କରିବ।
ଇସ୍ରାଏଲୀ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଦୂତ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଲେବାନନ ସହିତ ଉତ୍ତମ ପଡ଼ୋଶୀ ସମ୍ପର୍କ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିବାକୁ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ରଖିଛି, ଯାହା ଫଳରେ ଲୋକମାନେ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତରେ ତେଲ ଅଭିଭ ଏବଂ ବେରୁତ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଭୟ ବିନା ଯାତାୟାତ କରିପାରିବେ। ତଥାପି, ଏହି ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟର ସାକାରତା ଏହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ହେଜବୋଲାର ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଭିତ୍ତିଭୂମିକୁ କେତେ ଶୀଘ୍ର ଏବଂ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାବରେ ଭାଙ୍ଗି ଦିଆଯାଇପାରିବ ତାହା ଉପରେ ନିର୍ଭର କରେ।
ତଥାପି, ହେଜବୋଲା ଆମେରିକା-ସମର୍ଥିତ ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବକୁ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ଭାବରେ ପ୍ରତ୍ୟାଖ୍ୟାନ କରିଛି। ସଂଗଠନର ପ୍ରତିନିଧିତ୍ୱ କରୁଥିବା ଜଣେ ସାଂସଦ ହାସନ ଫଦଲାଲ୍ଲା କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ହେଜବୋଲା କୌଣସି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ତା’ର ଅସ୍ତ୍ର ରଖିବ ନାହିଁ। ସେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଲେବାନନ କୁ ଗୃହଯୁଦ୍ଧ ଆଡ଼କୁ ଠେଲି ଦେଉଛି, ଆହୁରି ମଧ୍ୟ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଯଦି ସରକାର ଏହାକୁ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରୀ କରିବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରେ, ତେବେ ଏହା ନିଜ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ସହିତ ମୁକାବିଲାର ସମ୍ମୁଖୀନ ହେବ। ଇରାନ ଉପରେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲୀ ଏବଂ ଆମେରିକାର ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପରେ ହେଜବୋଲା ଉତ୍ତର ଇସ୍ରାଏଲରେ ରକେଟ ମାଡ଼ କରିବା ପରେ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନର ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇଛି। ଏହାର ଜବାବରେ, ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଲେବାନନରେ ତାର ସାମରିକ ଅଭିଯାନକୁ ତୀବ୍ର କରିଛି, ଯାହା ଫଳରେ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ 4,000 ରୁ ଅଧିକ ଲୋକ ମୃତ୍ୟୁବରଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଏବଂ ଲେବାନନ ଉଭୟ ବାଇବଲ ସମୟରୁ ଇତିହାସ ସହିତ ପ୍ରାଚୀନ ସଭ୍ୟତାର ଉତ୍ତରାଧିକାରୀ। ଉଭୟ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ବିଶ୍ୱର କିଛି ସୁନ୍ଦର ଉପକୂଳରେ ଗର୍ବ କରନ୍ତି, ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଲୋକମାନେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଉଦ୍ୟୋଗୀ ମନୋଭାବ ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରସିଦ୍ଧ। ତଥାପି, କିଛି ଦଶନ୍ଧି ଧରି, ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ସଂଗଠନ ଏବଂ ବାହ୍ୟ ଶକ୍ତି ଏହି ସମଗ୍ର ଅଞ୍ଚଳକୁ ଯୁଦ୍ଧର ଏକ ଦଲଦଲରେ ବୁଡାଇ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ବାହ୍ୟ ଶକ୍ତିର ହସ୍ତକ୍ଷେପ କେବଳ ଲେବାନନର ସାର୍ବଭୌମତ୍ୱକୁ ଦୁର୍ବଳ କରିନଥିଲା ବରଂ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଉପରେ ନିରନ୍ତର, ଅର୍ଥହୀନ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିଥିଲା, ଯାହା ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରାଚ୍ୟରେ ଅସ୍ଥିରତା ବିସ୍ତାର କରିଥିଲା।
ଆମେରିକାର ବୈଦେଶିକ ବିଭାଗ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଏକ ବିବୃତ୍ତିରେ ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାକୁ ସେହି ବିଶୃଙ୍ଖଳାକୁ ଶେଷ କରିବା ଏବଂ ଉଭୟ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରକୁ ପ୍ରଗତି ପଥରେ ଫେରାଇ ଆଣିବା ପାଇଁ ଏକ ସୁବର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସୁଯୋଗ ଭାବରେ ବର୍ଣ୍ଣନା କରାଯାଇଛି। ଆଗାମୀ ଦିନରେ, ଉଭୟ ଦେଶର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରୀ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ଏହି ବ୍ୟାପକ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାର ଚୂଡ଼ାନ୍ତ ଖସଡା ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ସହଯୋଗ କରିବେ।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1, Most Trusted Odia Daily

The post ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ-ଲେବାନନ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତି ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷରିତ, ହେଜବୋଲାକୁ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବାକୁ ପଡିବ ଏସବୁ ସର୍ତ୍ତ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: ଶାଗୁଆନ ଗଛ କାଟୁଥିଲେ ଦୃର୍ବୁତ୍ତ, ଛିଣ୍ଡିଲା ୩୩ କେଭି ଲାଇନ ତାର: ଆଉ ତା’ପରେ…
description:
ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର,୨୬।୬(ବାବୁଲା ପ୍ରଧାନ)-ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଶନିବାର ସକାଳେ ପବନ ବର୍ଷା ନାହିଁ କିନ୍ତୁ ଦୁର୍ବୁତ୍ତମାନଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ବିଦ୍ୟୁତସେବା ବ୍ୟାହତ ହୋଇଛି। ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ସେବା ସ୍ବାଭାବିକ ହେବାକୁ ଦିନ ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୧ଟା ହୋଇଯିବ ବୋଲି ଟାଟା ପାୱାର ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଆକଳନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ସେବା ବ୍ୟାହତ ଯୋଗୁ ପ୍ରାୟ ୫୦ ହଜାରରୁ ଉର୍ଦ୍ଧ୍ୱ ଉପଭୋକ୍ତା ଏହାଦ୍ବାରା ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ଘଟଣାରୁ ପ୍ରକାଶ ଯେ, ଆଜି ପ୍ରତ୍ୟୁଷରେ କୌଣସି ଦୃର୍ବୁତ୍ତ କଇଣ୍ଟି ନିକଟରେ ଥିବା ଜଣଙ୍କ ଜମିର ଥିବା […]
The post ଶାଗୁଆନ ଗଛ କାଟୁଥିଲେ ଦୃର୍ବୁତ୍ତ, ଛିଣ୍ଡିଲା ୩୩ କେଭି ଲାଇନ ତାର: ଆଉ ତା’ପରେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: OnePlus Nord Buds 4 Review: Pro Features, Budget Price
description: The price of the OnePlus Nord Buds 4 in India is set at Rs. 3,299
content: The OnePlus Nord Buds 4 is a great budget-friendly package that punches far above its weight class. Even with all the corporate shifting happening in the background, OnePlus has proven they still know exactly how to nail a budget daily driver. The fit is comfortable, the design looks premium, ANC is dependable, and the sound is enjoyable. At Rs. 3,299, the OnePlus Nord Buds 4 are an easy recommendation and among the strongest all-rounders in their price segment.

title: Rajkumar Hirani, Arshad Warsi Exclusive: Pritam & Pedro, Vir Hirani, Munna Bhai-3 Idiots Trivia;N18V
description: Rajkumar Hirani's OTT debut Pritam And Pedro is all set to premiere on JioHotstar on July 3. In an exclusive chat with CNN-News18's Titas Chowdhury, Hirani along with actor Arshad Warsi and director Avinash Arun Dhaware talks about the former's son Vir's debut with the series. Hirani talks about dealing with nepotism chatter surrounding launching his son, while Warsi quips about how he doesn't take his father seriously. The director-actoe duo gives us some unknown trivia on Munna Bhai MBBS and 3 Idiots where Maria Goretti was about to be cast as Circuit's wife and many actresses had turned down Mona Singh's role. Hirani also spills the beans on 3 Idiots sequel, Munna Bhai 3 and his film with Ranbir Kapoor. Warsi, on the other hand, talks about not having work for 8 months post Munna Bhai MBBS and turning down lead roles, even asking Subhash Kapoor to cast Alshay Kumar and not him in Jolly LLB 3.

title: CIK raids multiple locations across Kashmir in UAPA case
description:
Srinagar, June 27: Counter Intelligence Kashmir (CIK) on Saturday conducted searches at multiple locations across the Kashmir Valley in connection with an ongoing investigation into a case registered undervarious sections of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA), officials said.
According to officials, the searches were carried out in connection with FIR No. 07/2023, registered under Sections 153-A, 505 and 506 of the IPC, along with Sections 13, 18, 18-B and 39 of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA). The raids were conducted pursuant to warrants issued by the competent court.
The searches were undertaken in accordance with due process as part of the ongoing investigation to collect evidence and establish facts relevant to the case.
Official sources said a CIK team searched the residence of Riyaz Ahmad Beigh, son of Noor Mohammad Beigh, a resident of Hokarsar and originally from Dalal Mohalla, Maharaj Gunj, Srinagar.
Another CIK team, led by a Deputy Superintendent of Police, carried out a search at the residence of Syed Qalandar Shah, son of Barkat Shah, a resident of Chountwaliwar, Lar, in Ganderbal district.
CIK also conducted a search at the residence of Gulzar Ahmad Rather, son of Abdul Gani Rather, an imam of Phali Masjid and a resident of Nowgam, Verinag, in south Kashmir's Anantnag district.
During the operation, officials seized documents and digital devices believed to have potential evidentiary value. The seized material will undergo forensic and technical examination in accordance with the law.
Official sources said the searches were underway when the last reports came in.
Further details are awaited.

title: Earthquake: ବୋଝ ଉପରେ ନଳିତା ବିଡ଼ା: ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାରେ ପୁଣି  ୪.୯ ତୀବ୍ରତା ଯୁକ୍ତ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ
description:
କାରାକାସ: ଭୂଭେନେଜୁଏଲାରେ ଆଉ ଏକ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ହୋଇଛି। ଶନିବାର ଦିନ ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାର ଉତ୍ତର ଉପକୂଳ ନିକଟରେ ଘଟିଥିବା ଭୂମିକମ୍ପର ତୀବ୍ରତା ରିକ୍ଟର ସ୍କେଲରେ ୪.୯ ମପାଯାଇଛି। ମିକମ୍ପ ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାର ସମୁଦ୍ରରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ଅନୁମାନ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏହି ନୂଆ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପରେ କେହି ମୃତାହତ ହେବାର କୌଣସି ରିପୋର୍ଟ ମିଳିନାହିଁ। ଦୁଇ ଦିନ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଏକ ଭୟଙ୍କର ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ପରେ ଦେଶ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ମାନବିକ ସଙ୍କଟର ସମ୍ମୁଖୀନ ହେଉଥିବାବେଳେ ପୁଣି ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଚିନ୍ତା ବଢ଼ାଇ ଦେଇଛି। ବୁଧବାର ସନ୍ଧ୍ୟାରେ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ୭.୧ ଏବଂ ୭.୫ ତୀବ୍ରତାର ଦୁଇଟି ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଏକ ପରେ ଏକ ଥର ଅନୁଭୂତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଏହି ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଉତ୍ତର ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାର ଅନେକ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ବଡ଼ ବଡ଼ କୋଠାଘରକୁ ଧରାଶାୟୀ କରିଦେଇଥିଲା। ଶନିବାରର ଭୂମିକମ୍ପକୁ ସେହି ଭୂମିକମ୍ପର ଏକ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଝଟକା ବୋଲି ବିଶ୍ୱାସ କରାଯାଉଛି। ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞମାନଙ୍କ ଅନୁସାରେ ଆଗାମୀ ଦିନରେ ଆହୁରି ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ଝଟକା ଆସିପାରେ।
ଆମେରିକାର ଭୂତତ୍ତ୍ୱ ସର୍ବେକ୍ଷଣ ସଂସ୍ଥା ରିପୋର୍ଟ କରିଛି ଯେ, ଶନିବାର ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାର ଆଲାସ୍କାରୁ ୧୩ କିଲୋମିଟର ଦକ୍ଷିଣ-ପୂର୍ବରେ କ୍ଲାମ ଗୁଲଚରେ ୪.୯ ତୀବ୍ରତାର ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଅନୁଭୂତ ହୋଇଛି। ଏହାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରସ୍ଥଳ ଭୂପୃଷ୍ଠର ୫୫ କିଲୋମିଟର ଗଭୀରତାରେ ଥିଲା। ସମୁଦ୍ରରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ସଦ୍ୟତମ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ପରେ ଭୂକମ୍ପବିଜ୍ଞାନୀମାନେ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ଉପରେ କଡ଼ା ନଜର ରଖିଛନ୍ତି।
ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ୯୨୦ ଜଣଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ
ବୁଧବାର ଦିନ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଦୁଇଟି ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଦେଶର ସାମ୍ପ୍ରତିକ ଇତିହାସରେ ସବୁଠାରୁ ଭୟଙ୍କର ପ୍ରାକୃତିକ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟୟ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଥିଲା। ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାରେ ଭୂମିକମ୍ପ ଯୋଗୁଁ ୯୨୦ ଜଣଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇଥିବା ନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ହଜାର ହଜାର ଲୋକ ଏବେ ବି ନିଖୋଜ ଅଛନ୍ତି। ଅନୁସନ୍ଧାନ ଅଭିଯାନ ଜାରି ରହିଥିବାରୁ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ସଂଖ୍ୟା ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇପାରେ ବୋଲି ଆଶଙ୍କା କରାଯାଉଛି। ଜରୁରୀକାଳୀନ ଉଦ୍ଧାରକାରୀ ଦଳ ଧ୍ୱଂସାବଶେଷ ତଳେ ଫସି ରହିଥିବା ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ଖୋଜିବା ପାଇଁ କାମ କରୁଛନ୍ତି। କ୍ଷତିଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ରାସ୍ତା, ଯୋଗାଯୋଗ ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ବ୍ୟାପକ ଧ୍ୱଂସାବଶେଷ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟର ଗତିକୁ ବାଧା ଦେଉଛି। ସମ୍ବଳ ଅଭାବରୁ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ପାଖରେ ଖାଦ୍ୟ, ପାଣି ଏବଂ ଔଷଧ ପହଞ୍ଚିବାରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଅସୁବିଧା ଦେଖାଦେଇଛି।
Netanyahu: ୱାସିଂଟନରେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ-ଲେବାନନ୍ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତିର ରୂପରେଖ ସ୍ୱାକ୍ଷରିତ: ନେତାନ୍ୟାହୁଙ୍କ ସର୍ତ୍ତ ନେଇ ବଢ଼ିଲା ଅଚଳାବସ୍ଥା
ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାରେ ମାନବିକ ସଙ୍କଟ ଗଭୀର ହେବା ସହିତ, ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସହାୟତା ମଧ୍ୟ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇଛି। ଅନେକ ଦେଶ ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସଂଗଠନ ଭେନେଜୁଏଲାକୁ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ସହରାଞ୍ଚଳ ସନ୍ଧାନ ଏବଂ ଉଦ୍ଧାରକାରୀ ଦଳ, ଡାକ୍ତରୀ କର୍ମଚାରୀ ଏବଂ ରିଲିଫ୍ ସାମଗ୍ରୀ ପଠାଇଛନ୍ତି। ଆଗାମୀ ଦିନରେ ଅଧିକ ଦଳ ଆସିବାର ଆଶା କରାଯାଉଛି।

title: ইৰাণৰ সামৰিক ঘাটিত আমেৰিকাৰ আক্ৰমণ
CIK conducts multiple raids across valley, mobile phone seized in UAPA case
description:
Srinagar, June 27 : The Counter Intelligence Kashmir (CIK) carried out multiple, simultaneous raids across the Kashmir Valley on Saturday as part of an ongoing investigation into a Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA) case, official sources said.
In a coordinated operation, CIK teams swooped down on locations in Srinagar, Ganderbal, and Anantnag districts. The searches are linked to FIR No. 07/2023, registered at the CIK's Police Station JIC in Srinagar under various sections of the Indian Penal Code and the stringent UAPA, including provisions related to promoting enmity and criminal intimidation.
Official sources told KNS that in Srinagar, a CIK team conducted a raid at the residence of Riyaz Ahmad Beigh, son of Noor Mohammad Beigh, originally from Maharaj Gunj but currently residing at Hokarsar near Shalteng Police Station for the last 16 years. The operation was stated to be in progress.
 In the central Kashmir district of Ganderbal, a team led by Deputy Superintendent of Police (DySP) Nissar Ahmad carried out searches at the house of Syed Qalandar Shah, son of Barkat Shah, a resident of Chountwaliwar Lar.
The search operation was underway when last reports came in.
In the southern district of Anantnag, a CIK team, led by the local DySP and accompanied by NT Mudasir Yosuf Bhat, raided the residence of Gulzar Ahmad Rather (42), son of Abdul Gani Rather, of Nowgam, Kapran. Rather, a Class 10 pass out, has been serving as the Imam at Phali Masjid Nowgam since 2012, sources added.
 During the search at the Nowgam Verinag location, investigators recovered and seized a Redmi 9 Note Pro mobile phone, which was taken into custody for forensic examination in connection with the UAPA case, the sources said.
 Officials confirmed that the raid in the Anantnag district concluded peacefully without any untoward incident. Searches at the other locations in the valley were continuing and further details were awaited, they added. (KNS)

title: More H5 Avian Flu Cases Detected in Wild Birds in Australia
description: The deadly H5 avian influenza has been discovered in a fourth wild bird in Australia, with a fifth case suspected.
content: A lab technician demonstrates injecting eggs with a sample of the H5N1 bird flu virus in a laboratory at The Pirbright Institute in Woking, UK. Photographer: Jason Alden/Bloomberg

title: 'They Will Retreat And Regret': Iran Hits Back At US Military Positions
description: The IRGC Navy has claimed responsibility for targeting US military positions in response to recent American airstrikes on Iranian territory.
content: After the United States launched airstrikes on Iranian military targets, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) Navy announced that it had targeted US military positions in the region in retaliation, IRNA News Agency reported on Friday. Ebrahim Azizi, a member of the Islamic Consultative Assembly of Iran, said that the US does not commit to a ceasefire, and the blame game does not work anymore.In a post on X, he said, "The U.S. attacked Iran in the middle of negotiations once again. The failed U.S. President has shown he has no commitment to the principles of negotiation or a ceasefire. This reckless violation of the ceasefire will, as always, lead to retreat and regret on their part. The blame game does not work anymore."'Violence will be met with violence': VanceUS Vice President JD Vance, meanwhile, said that if Iran has disagreements about how the MOU is being applied, they can pick up the phone.In a post on X, he said, "Iran signed a ceasefire agreement. We have honoured it. If they have disagreements about how the MOU is being applied, they can pick up the phone. But violence will be met with violence."Meanwhile, Ibrahim al-Fiqar, Official military Spokesperson for Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters, the operational command center that coordinates the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) and the regular Iranian army, said that Iran's response "to the US attack" this time will be unprecedented.In a series of posts on X, he said, "You must look to the sky. The American aggression came hours after the Zionist entity violated the ceasefire in southern Lebanon and Washington reneged on its commitments. Brace yourselves for the thunderbolt, for tonight you have no protector."The latest exchange comes only days after Washington and Tehran agreed to halt hostilities following weeks of military confrontation.(With agency inputs)

title: US strikes on Iran test fragile ceasefire
description: The US has struck Iran for the first time since the two sides reached a Memorandum of Understanding on June 17.

title: Netanyahu: ୱାସିଂଟନରେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ-ଲେବାନନ୍ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତିର ରୂପରେଖ ସ୍ୱାକ୍ଷରିତ: ନେତାନ୍ୟାହୁଙ୍କ ସର୍ତ୍ତ ନେଇ ବଢ଼ିଲା ଅଚଳାବସ୍ଥା
description:
ୱାସିଂଟନ: ମଧ୍ୟପ୍ରାଚ୍ୟରେ ମାସ ମାସ ଧରି ଚାଲିଥିବା ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ମଧ୍ୟରେ, ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଏବଂ ଆଶ୍ୱସ୍ତିକର ଖବର ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସିଛି।ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଏବଂଲେବାନନ୍ ଏକ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାର ରୂପରେଖ ସ୍ୱାକ୍ଷର କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହା ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଏବଂ ହିଜବୁଲ୍ଲା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଚାଲିଥିବା ଯୁଦ୍ଧର ଅନ୍ତ ଘଟାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଏକ ଐତିହାସିକ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ବୋଲି କୁହାଯାଉଛି। ୱାସିଂଟନରେ ଆମେରିକା ମଧ୍ୟସ୍ଥତାରେ କିଛି ଦିନ ଧରି ଚାଲିଥିବା ଆଲୋଚନା ପରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ଐତିହାସିକ ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାକୁ ଏହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ସ୍ଥିରତା ଫେରାଇ ଆଣିବା ଦିଗରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ଏବଂ ସବୁଠାରୁ ବଡ଼ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଭାବରେ ଦେଖାଯାଉଛି। ୱାସିଂଟନର ଷ୍ଟେଟ୍ ଡିପାର୍ଟମେଣ୍ଟରେ ଏହି ଐତିହାସିକ ଦସ୍ତାବିଜ ସ୍ୱାକ୍ଷରିତ ହୋଇଛି । ଆମେରିକାରେ ଲେବାନନର ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଦୂତ ନାଦା ହମାଦେହ ମୋୱାଦ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲୀ ପ୍ରତିପକ୍ଷ ୟେଚିଏଲ୍ ଲିଟର ଆମେରିକା ଅଧିକାରୀଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ତ୍ରିପାକ୍ଷିକ ଦସ୍ତାବିଜ ଉପରେ ସହମତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। କୂଟନୈତିକ ବିଶେଷଜ୍ଞମାନଙ୍କ ଅନୁସାରେ ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା କେବଳ ଏକ କାଗଜ ଖଣ୍ଡ ନୁହେଁ, ବରଂ ଏକ ଦୀର୍ଘ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରୟାସ ଯାହା ଏକ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣାଙ୍ଗ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଆଡ଼କୁ ଉଭୟପକ୍ଷଙ୍କୁ ନେଇପାରିବ।
ଦୁଇ ପଡ଼ୋଶୀ ଦେଶ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ଶାନ୍ତି ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରିବା
ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ଆମେରିକାର ବୈଦେଶିକ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମାର୍କୋ ରୁବିଓ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଆଜି ଏକ ଯାତ୍ରାର ଆରମ୍ଭ ଯାହା ନିଃସନ୍ଦେହରେ କଷ୍ଟକର ଏବଂ ଚ୍ୟାଲେଞ୍ଜିଂ ହେବ, କିନ୍ତୁ ଶାନ୍ତି ପାଇଁ ଏହା ଅତ୍ୟାବଶ୍ୟକ। ଆଲୋଚନା ସମୟରେ ସେ ଲେବାନନ୍ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଦୂତ ନାଦା ହମାଦେହଙ୍କ ମତକୁ ଉଚ୍ଚ ପ୍ରଶଂସା କରିଥିଲେ। ତେବେ ଅଧିକାରୀମାନେ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିର ବିବରଣୀ ସେୟାର କରିନାହାନ୍ତି। ଏହାର ସର୍ତ୍ତାବଳୀ ଏପ୍ରିଲ ୧୬ ର ପୂର୍ବ ଅସ୍ତ୍ରବିରତି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାଠାରୁ କେତେ ଭିନ୍ନ କିମ୍ବା ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ ହେବ ତାହା ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରାଯାଇ ନାହିଁ। ଲେବାନନ୍ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଦୂତ ହମାଦେହ ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମାକୁ ଲେବାନନ୍ ପାଇଁ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ବିଜୟ ବୋଲି କହିଛନ୍ତି। ତାଙ୍କ ମତରେ, ଏହା ଲେବାନନ୍‌ର ସାର୍ବଭୌମତ୍ୱ ଏବଂ ଆଞ୍ଚଳିକ ଅଖଣ୍ଡତାକୁ ପୁନରୁଦ୍ଧାର କରିବା ଦିଗରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ। ସେ ଆଶା ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଏହା ସବୁଦିନ ପାଇଁ ଯୁଦ୍ଧର ଅନ୍ତ କରିବ ଏବଂ ଲେବାନନବାସୀଙ୍କୁ ଶାନ୍ତି, ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଏବଂ ସମୃଦ୍ଧିରେ ବଞ୍ଚିବାକୁ ଦେବ। ଇସ୍ରାଏଲୀ ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରଦୂତ ଲିଟର କହିଛନ୍ତି, ଏହି ପ୍ରୟାସର ଚୂଡ଼ାନ୍ତ ଏବଂ ଏକମାତ୍ର ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି ଦୁଇ ପଡ଼ୋଶୀ ଦେଶ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସ୍ଥାୟୀ ଶାନ୍ତି ପ୍ରତିଷ୍ଠା କରିବା। ତେବେ ଶାନ୍ତି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଘୋଷଣା ହେବାର ମାତ୍ର କିଛି ଘଣ୍ଟା ପରେ, ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ବେଞ୍ଜାମିନ୍ ନେତାନ୍ୟାହୁ ଏକ ବିବୃତ୍ତି ଜାରି କରି ବିଶ୍ୱକୁ ଆଶ୍ଚର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ନେତାନ୍ୟାହୁ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରିଛନ୍ତି, ହିଜବୁଲ୍ଲାକୁ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ନିରସ୍ତ୍ର ନ କରିବା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲୀ ସୈନ୍ୟ ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଲେବାନନରେ ମୁତୟନ ରହିବେ।
Jagatsinghpur Hospital: ମୋବାଇଲ ଫୋନ୍ ଆଲୁଅରେ ଫୋଡ଼ା ହେଲା ସାଲାଇନ୍, ଇଞ୍ଜେକସନ୍

title: Murder: ବନ୍ଦ ଘରୁ ମିଳିଲା ଯୁବକଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହ: ହତ୍ୟା ସନ୍ଦେହ
description:
ପାଲଲହଡା: ପାଲଲହଡା ବ୍ଲକ ଖମାର ଥାନା କରଡ଼ାପାଳ ଗାଁରେ ଅଭାବନୀୟ ଘଟଣା। ପଡ଼ୋଶୀ ଘର ଭିତରୁ ଆଜି ସକାଳେ ଯୁବକଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରିଛନ୍ତି ପରିବାର ଲୋକ l ହତ୍ୟା ସନ୍ଦେହ ଆଣିଛନ୍ତି ପରିବାର ଲୋକ, ମୃତ ଯୁବକ ହେଲେ ଧୀରେନ ବୋହିତା ।
ରାତିରେ ଘରକୁ ଫେରିନଥିଲେ
ମୃତ ଯୁବକଙ୍କ ଭାଇ ଠାରୁ ମିଳିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଗତକାଲି ଗାଁରେ ବାହାଘର ଥିଲା ଧୀରେନ ବାହାଘର ଭୋଜି ଖାଇ ରାତି ଆଠଟା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଗାଁରେ ଏକ ବର ଗଛମୂଳ ପିଣ୍ଡିରେ ବସିଥିଲେ l ରାତିରେ ଆଉ ଘରକୁ ଫେରିନଥିଲେ । ସକାଳ ପରିବାର ଲୋକ ଗାଁର ପମ୍ପ ହାଉସ ନିକଟରେ ଥିବା ଏକ ବନ୍ଦ କୋଠରୀରୁ ଧୀରେନଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରିଛନ୍ତି l ତଦନ୍ତ ପାଇଁ ପରିବାର ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଖମାର ପୁଲିସକୁ ସୂଚନା ଦିଆଯାଇଛି। ଧୀରେନଙ୍କୁ କିଏ ମାରି ଘରଭିତରେ ହତ୍ୟା କରି ପକେଇଦେଇଥିବାର ସନ୍ଦେହ ହେଉଛି l

title: Netanyahu's Big Move: Israel To Pull Back From Two Areas After Lebanon Deal
description: The United States, Israel, and Lebanon have signed a trilateral agreement in Washington, laying the foundation for future peace negotiations after four days of talks.
content: New Delhi: The United States, Israel and Lebanon on Friday signed a trilateral framework agreement aimed at laying the groundwork for a future peace deal, marking a significant diplomatic breakthrough after four days of negotiations in Washington.Announcing the agreement, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said it was the first step towards achieving lasting peace between Israel and Lebanon."We are happy to announce a framework agreement between the sovereign government of Lebanon and, of course, the government of Israel, with the mediation and support of the United States of America," Rubio said during the signing ceremony.Calling it the "beginning of the beginning," Rubio acknowledged that difficult negotiations still lie ahead."There is a lot of work ahead. We do not, in any way, underestimate the difficulty of the task. But we understand how important this is, and we are honoured to help bring it together," he said.Lebanon's Ambassador to the United States, Nada Hamadeh Moawad, described the agreement as the "first step" towards restoring Lebanon's sovereignty and territorial integrity.Netanyahu Announces IDF PullbackShortly after the agreement was signed, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced that the Israel Defence Forces (IDF) would withdraw from two positions in southern Lebanon, one north of the Litani River and another to its south.In a pre-recorded video message, Netanyahu said the redeployment would involve areas the Israeli military "does not need" to continue holding.However, he stressed that Israel would retain control over other strategic areas in southern Lebanon until Hezbollah is fully disarmed.Netanyahu also described the agreement as a major strategic victory for Israel and said it delivered a significant blow to Iran."Iran is trying to force us into a withdrawal from southern Lebanon by force. Israel, Lebanon and the United States are telling them: this is none of your business," he said.Israel continues to maintain control over several areas in southern Lebanon, including territory south of the Litani River.What Does The Agreement Include?According to Axios, the framework agreement includes two pilot projects under which Israeli forces will withdraw from limited areas currently under their control in southern Lebanon.The Lebanese Armed Forces will subsequently deploy to those locations, with US military personnel overseeing the process to ensure Hezbollah fighters do not re-enter or operate from the designated zones.The two pilot areas are located on opposite sides of the Litani River, with one north of the river and the other to the south.Israeli officials described the move as limited in scope but significant, as it marks Israel's first withdrawal from territory captured during its expanded military operations in southern Lebanon.Fighting Continues Despite Diplomatic PushDespite progress in Washington, hostilities on the ground have continued. The Israeli military said on Friday that it killed seven Hezbollah operatives allegedly operating near the occupied area. Reuters could not independently verify the claim.The latest conflict erupted on March 2 after the Iran-backed Hezbollah launched attacks on Israeli territory, days after the United States and Israel carried out strikes on Iran.Israel responded with a large-scale air and ground campaign across Lebanon. According to available figures, the fighting has killed more than 4,000 people in Lebanon and displaced over one million others. On the Israeli side, at least 32 soldiers and four civilians have been killed. Hezbollah has not released official casualty figures, although a Reuters report published in May estimated that the group has lost thousands of fighters.US-Iran Talks ContinueThe agreement comes as Washington and Tehran continue parallel diplomatic efforts. The United States and Iran have signed a preliminary agreement aimed at ending the broader conflict and are currently engaged in a 60-day negotiation process covering Iran's nuclear programme, sanctions relief and maritime security in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Another earthquake hits Venezuela days after nearly 1000 killed in twin quakes
description: A 4.9-magnitude earthquake struck off Venezuela's northern coast on Friday, shaking Caracas and Maracay. The tremor comes days after deadly earthquakes caused widespread destruction and significant loss of life.
content: A 4.9-magnitude earthquake struck off the northern coast of Venezuela on Friday afternoon, adding to concerns in a country still recovering from a series of devastating seismic events earlier this week.The tremor was felt in several parts of the country, including the capital city of Caracas and the nearby city of Maracay, according to Reuters witnesses. While the latest quake was relatively moderate in strength, it triggered fresh anxiety among residents already shaken by the recent disasters.The European-Mediterranean Seismological Centre (EMSC) reported that the earthquake measured 4.9 on the Richter scale. The quake originated off Venezuela's northern coastline, an area known for occasional seismic activity due to the complex interaction of tectonic plates in the region.Authorities have not immediately reported any casualties or significant structural damage linked to Friday's earthquake. However, emergency agencies are continuing to monitor the situation closely as aftershocks and additional tremors remain possible following major seismic events.The latest earthquake comes only days after twin earthquakes struck parts of the region, causing widespread devastation. The powerful tremors flattened buildings, damaged infrastructure and left nearly 1,000 people dead, according to reports. Rescue and recovery operations have been ongoing as emergency teams work to assist affected communities and assess the full extent of the damage.For many residents, Friday's quake served as a reminder that seismic risks remain elevated in the aftermath of major earthquakes. Even moderate tremors can be unsettling, particularly for people living in areas where homes, offices and public infrastructure may have already been weakened by previous shocks.Seismologists often warn that a large earthquake can be followed by a series of aftershocks ranging from minor tremors to stronger events. These aftershocks can continue for days, weeks or even months, depending on the scale of the original earthquake and local geological conditions.Venezuela is located in a seismically active zone where the Caribbean Plate and the South American Plate interact. Although most earthquakes in the region are relatively small, the country has experienced several significant seismic events throughout its history.Government agencies and disaster response teams remain on alert as they continue relief efforts in areas affected by the earlier earthquakes. Officials are also urging residents to follow safety guidelines, stay informed through official channels and be prepared for potential aftershocks.As recovery work continues, communities across Venezuela are hoping for stability after a week marked by destruction, loss and repeated seismic activity. The latest tremor may not have caused major damage, but it highlights the ongoing challenges facing a nation still grappling with the aftermath of deadly earthquakes.

title: Jagatsinghpur Hospital: ମୋବାଇଲ ଫୋନ୍ ଆଲୁଅରେ ଫୋଡ଼ା ହେଲା ସାଲାଇନ୍, ଇଞ୍ଜେକସନ୍
description:
ଜଗତସିଂହପୁର: ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ରାତି ପ୍ରାୟ ସାଢ଼େ ୮ଟାରେ ହଠାତ୍ ଜଗତସିଂହପୁର ଜିଲ୍ଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟ ଅଧା ଅନ୍ଧାର ହୋଇଗଲା। ଅନ୍ଧାରରେ ରୋଗୀ ସେବା ଚାଲିଲା। ସାଲାଇନ୍, ଇଞ୍ଜେକସନ୍ ବି ଫୋଡ଼ା ହେଲା। ପ୍ରାୟ ଘଣ୍ଟାଏ କାଳ ଧରି ଏମିତି ଚିକିତ୍ସା ଚାଲିଥିଲା। ଗରମ, ଗୁଳୁଗୁଳିରେ ସନ୍ତୁଳି ହୋଇ ଯାଇଥିଲେ ରୋଗୀ। ଘଣ୍ଟାଏ ପରେ ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ସେବା ସ୍ବାଭାବିକ ହୋଇଥିଲା। କିନ୍ତୁ ଯଦି ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ସରବରାହ ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନ ହୁଏ ତାହେଲେ ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ଜଟିଳ ହେବ ବୋଲି କୁହାଯାଉଛି।
ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ବିଭାଗର ଦକ୍ଷତା ଉପରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନବାଚୀ
ମିଳିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ଅନୁସାରେ, ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଜଗତସିଂହପୁରରେ ପ୍ରବଳ ଘଡ଼ଘଡ଼ି ସହ ବର୍ଷା ଓ ପବନ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ବଜ୍ରପାତ ଓ ପବନରେ ଅର୍ଦ୍ଧାଧିକ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ଅନ୍ଧାର ହୋଇ ଯାଇଥିଲା। ଦୀର୍ଘ ସମୟ ଧରି ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ସେବା ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଜିଲ୍ଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟ ଅଧା ଅନ୍ଧାର ହୋଇ ଯାଇଥିଲା। ମହିଳା ଓ ପୁରୁଷ ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଓ୍ବାର୍ଡ , ଡାଇରିଆ ଓ୍ବାର୍ଡ, ଟିକେଟ କାଉଣ୍ଟର, ନିଦାନ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର, ଶବାଗାରରୁ ମଧ୍ୟ ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ସରବରାହ ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନ ହୋଇ ଯାଇଥିଲା। ମେଡିସିନ୍ ଓ୍ବାର୍ଡ, ଡାଇରିଆ ଓ୍ବାର୍ଡରେ ମୋବାଇଲ ଫୋନ୍ ଆଲୁଅରେ ସାଲାଇନ୍ ଓ ଇଞ୍ଜେକସନ୍ ଦିଆ ଯାଇଥିବା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଥିବା। ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଥିଲା, ବଜ୍ରପାତରେ ଜେନେରେଟର କ୍ଷତିଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ହୋଇ ଥିବାରୁ ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ସରବରାହ ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନ ବେଳେ ଚାଲି ନ ଥିଲା। ଯାହାଫଳରେ ଅନ୍ଧାର ହୋଇ ଯାଇଥିଲା। ଯଦି ପୁଣି ବିଦ୍ୟୁତ ସରବରାହ ବିଚ୍ଛିନ୍ନ ହୁଏ ତାହେଲେ ଅନ୍ଧାର ହୋଇଯିବ ବୋଲି ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି। ଜେନେରେଟର ମରାମତି ହେବା ପରେ ଯାହା କିଛି ହେବ। ଜିଲ୍ଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟରେ ଏପରି ଅବସ୍ଥାକୁ ନେଇ ସାଧାରଣରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନବାଚୀ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି। ଅଧିକ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା କାହିଁକି କରାଯାଉ ନାହିଁ ତାକୁ ନେଇ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ବିଭାଗର ଦକ୍ଷତା ଉପରେ ପ୍ରଶ୍ନବାଚୀ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି।
Orissa High Court: ତିନି ଦଶନ୍ଧି ଧରି କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ କରିବା ପରେ ବହିଷ୍କାର: ୪୦ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କା କ୍ଷତିପୂରଣ ପ୍ରଦାନ ପାଇଁ ହାଇକୋର୍ଟଙ୍କ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ

title: Siya, Chetan Deleted Chats Before and After Alleged Murder, Say Cops
description: The investigation into Pune realtor Ketan Agrawal's alleged murder reveals that the accused, Siya Goyal and Chetan Chaudhary, deleted chat messages from their phones both before and after the crime to eliminate evidence.
content: Police investigating the alleged murder of Pune-based realtor Ketan Agrawal have claimed that the two accused, Siya Goyal and her alleged lover Chetan Chaudhary, deleted chat messages from their mobile phones both before and after the crime in an alleged attempt to destroy evidence.According to investigators, the accused erased conversations from their respective phones before the alleged murder and again after Ketan was pushed off a cliff at Maharashtra's Lohagad Fort on June 18. Police are examining digital evidence to recover the deleted chats as part of the ongoing investigation.According to police sources, after Ketan’s murder, Chetan and Siya had allegedly planned not to meet each other for a few days. According to sources, they believed staying away from each other would help avoid suspicion. The two also allegedly deleted their chats so that no one could accidentally discover their relationship. Sources say they made every possible effort to stay out of the police’s reach. Police have now sent both their mobile phones to the forensic lab to recover the deleted chats and gather digital evidence.Siya Goyal (20) and Chetan Chaudhary (22), who were allegedly in a relationship, are accused of conspiring to kill 25-year-old Ketan Agrawal. Investigators claim Siya did not want to marry Ketan despite their wedding being scheduled for November and allegedly planned the murder with Chetan.The case was initially treated as an accidental death after Ketan fell from a cliff during a trek at Lohagad Fort. However, the investigation later took a dramatic turn, with police alleging that the murder had been planned for months and that two earlier attempts had failed before the June 18 incident.        “Our investigation has shown that both the accused deleted their chats from their phones before June 18 and again after the Lohgad incident,” said a police officer, who is a part of the investigation.He said that the devices have been sent to a forensic laboratory for analysis and retrieval of the messages. According to the police, Siya and Chetan had exchanged a staggering 2,004 phone calls, spending 238 hours talking to each other.On the day of the incident, the two allegedly met at a cafe and discussed the plan to eliminate Ketan, even identifying a suitable spot on the fort from where the realtor could be pushed, a police officer had said earlier.Meanwhile, Pune rural police summoned Siya’s brother for questioning. “Her other members and friends will also be summoned. So far, the roles of both Siya and Chetan have been established in the alleged murder of Ketan,” said Gajanan Tonpe, Deputy Superintendent of Police (Lonavala division) of Pune rural police.Earlier in the day, police said that Chetan had provoked Siya to eliminate Ketan. Chetan initially claimed that he was present at the fort but did not go to the spot where Ketan was pushed off the cliff, and did not know exactly what happened, the official had said.As per the plan, Siya was to give a signal by sitting down, following which Chetan was to come up and push Ketan to his death. They executed the plan exactly, the official said.“They have told us what happened and how it happened. Ketan had no idea what was coming,” the official had said.Meanwhile, Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis on Friday assured Ketan’s family that the government would ensure strict punishment to those responsible and spare no effort in securing justice.Fadnavis also accepted the Agarwal family’s demand to try the case in a fast-track court and the appointment of top lawyer Ujjwal Nikam.“We met Fadnavis ji and sought a speedy trial in the case. We also sought that the truth should be unravelled, and if there are any other people involved, they should also be booked. All those responsible for the murder of my son should get severe punishment,” said Vishal Agarwal, Ketan's Father. He also rejected reports suggesting that his son's wig was a reason behind the alleged crime. He said both Siya and her family knew before the engagement that Ketan wore a small wig patch and questioned the alleged motive. Siya’s mother has claimed that her daughter was reluctant to visit Lohagad Fort on June 18, but Ketan and his mother persuaded her to make the trip.“On the evening of June 17, Siya and Ketan had a video call, during which Ketan asked her to accompany him to Lohagad. During the call, Ketan’s mother also spoke to Siya and urged her to join him. Siya told her that she did not want to go trekking, as there was a function scheduled for the following day and she wanted to rest,” her mother claimed.(With Inputs from PTI)Times Now Digital | OpinionConsent must precede every marriage. Families must read hesitation as a warning, not rebellion, and let the hard conversations happen before the vows. Yet the alleged killing of Ketan Agarwal proves one truth absolutely: no pressure, real or imagined, can ever justify murder. The guilt is the killer’s alone.
